english: subjecting yourselves to one another in the fear of Christ.

kikuyu: Nĩngatũma o magĩe na ũrũmwe wa ngoro o na mĩthiĩre-inĩ yao, nĩgeetha matũũre manjĩtigĩrĩte nĩgeetha matũũre moonaga wega o ene na ciana ciao
english: The measuring line will go out further straight onward to the hill Gareb, and will turn toward Goah.

kikuyu: Jakubu akĩruta igongona kũu bũrũri-inĩ ũcio wa irĩma, na agĩĩta andũ a nyũmba yake marĩĩanĩre. Na marĩkia kũrĩa-rĩ, makĩraara o kũu.
english: Jacob offered a sacrifice in the mountain, and called his relatives to eat bread. They ate bread, and stayed all night in the mountain.

kikuyu: Ndũkahaane ta mbarathi kana nyũmbũ, iria itarĩ ũmenyo, iria arĩ o nginya ciĩkĩrwo matamu na mĩkwa kanua, kwaga ũguo itingĩgũkuhĩrĩria.
english: For he spoke, and it was done. He commanded, and it stood firm.

kikuyu: O na gũtariĩ ũguo nĩndirikanaga ũndũ ũyũ, na tondũ wa ũguo ngagĩa na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro:
english: This I recall to my mind; therefore I have hope.

kikuyu: Matukũ macio maathira ũcooke ũtũroranie na aanake acio angĩ marĩĩaga irio icio cia mũthamaki, na thuutha ũcio ũcooke gwĩka ndungata ciaku o ta ũrĩa ũkuona kwagĩrĩire.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩtĩkĩra ũhoro ũcio, nake akĩmageria matukũ macio ikũmi.
english: The Lord Yahweh says: “This shall be the border by which you shall divide the land for inheritance according to the twelve tribes of Israel. Joseph shall have two portions.

kikuyu: Tondũ wa wonjoria waku kũingĩha, nawe ũkĩĩhia. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩkũrutũrũra kuuma kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Ngai ũnyararĩkĩte, na wee kerubi, wee ũgitanagĩra, ngĩkũingata wehere mahiga-inĩ macio ma mwaki.
english: By the abundance of your commerce, your insides were filled with violence, and you have sinned. Therefore I have cast you as profane out of God’s mountain. I have destroyed you, covering cherub, from the middle of the stones of fire.

kikuyu: Rĩu kĩraare haha ũtukũ ũyũ, na rũciinĩ gwakĩa angĩkorwo nĩekwenda gũkũmenyerera, nĩ wega; nĩagakũmenyerera. No angĩkorwo ndekwenda, o ta ũrĩaJehova atũũragamuoyo, nĩngakũmenyerera. Kĩraarehahanginyarũciũrũciinĩ.”
english: would you then wait until they were grown? Would you then refrain from having husbands? No, my daughters, for it grieves me seriously for your sakes, for Yahweh’s hand has gone out against me.”

kikuyu: Ithuĩ tũrĩ andũ aku kuuma tene; no rĩrĩ, o ndũrĩ wamathamakĩra, o na matirĩ metanio na rĩĩtwa rĩaku.
english: We have become like those over whom you never ruled, like those who were not called by your name.

kikuyu: Maharaganagia njĩra yakwa; mahotaga kũnyũnũha o na gũtarĩ na mũndũ ũramateithia.
english: They mar my path. They promote my destruction without anyone’s help.

kikuyu: Arũme othe a ũkũrũ wa kuuma mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ nginya mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtano arĩa mookire gũtungata wĩra-inĩ wa Hema-ya- Gũtũnganwo,
english: *Joakim was twenty-five years old when he began to reign in Judea and Jerusalem. He did that which was evil in the sight of the Lord.

kikuyu: Tũkũmwĩtĩkĩria tondũ wa gĩtũmi o kĩmwe tu; inyuĩ mũtuĩke ta ithuĩ na ũndũ wa kũruithia arũme anyu othe.
english: Jacob called the name of the place where God spoke with him “Bethel”.

kikuyu: Wee no kwĩrorera ũkerorera na maitho maku wĩonere iherithia rĩa andũ arĩa aaganu.
english: But you, Yahweh, are on high forever more.

kikuyu: O hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia watũire oiraga thakame mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ agĩũka na thuutha wa Jesũ, akĩhutia gĩcũrĩ kĩa nguo yake.
english: For it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father who speaks in you.

kikuyu: no nĩgũgũcooka kũrũmĩrĩrwo nĩ mĩaka mũgwanja ya ngʼaragu. Naguo bũthi ũcio wothe wa Misiri nĩũkariganĩra, nayo ngʼaragu nĩĩkananga bũrũri ũyũ.
english: Seven years of famine will arise after them, and all the plenty will be forgotten in the land of Egypt. The famine will consume the land,

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa maatuĩkĩte thũ ciakwa hatarĩ gĩtũmi nĩo maanguĩmaga ta nyoni.
english: They have chased me relentlessly like a bird, those who are my enemies without cause.

kikuyu: “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, wee mũrũ wa mũndũ, arĩria andũ a Isiraeli, ũmeere atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Thĩinĩ wa ũndũ ũyũ o naguo, maithe manyu nĩmanumire na ũndũ wa kũndirika: Rĩrĩa ndaamareehire bũrũri ũrĩa ndeehĩtire atĩ nĩngamahe, rĩrĩa moonire kĩrĩma o gĩothe kĩraihu kana mũtĩ o wothe warĩ na mathangũ, hau nĩho maarutĩire magongona mao, makĩruta magongona marĩa maatũmire ndakare, na makĩruta ũbumba wao ũrĩa mũnungi wega, o na magĩitanga maruta mao ma kũnyuuo.
english: “Therefore, son of man, speak to the house of Israel, and tell them, ‘The Lord Yahweh says: “Moreover, in this your fathers have blasphemed me, in that they have committed a trespass against me.

kikuyu: “Andũ arĩa othe makũrakaragĩra magagũũkĩrĩra ti-itherũ nĩmagaconorithio na manyararithio; arĩa marũaga nawe magaatuĩka o ta kĩndũ hatarĩ na mathire biũ.
english: Behold, all those who are incensed against you will be disappointed and confounded. Those who strive with you will be like nothing, and shall perish.

kikuyu: Maigua ciugo icio, Ayahudi makĩamũkana o rĩngĩ.
english: Many of the Jews had joined the women around Martha and Mary, to console them concerning their brother.

kikuyu: Wamĩhumbĩrire na iria rĩrĩa inene taarĩ nguo; maaĩ maikarire makunĩkĩire irĩma. No rĩrĩ, wakũũmire maaĩ makĩũra, nacio ngwa ciaku ciagamba magĩĩthara;
english: You covered it with the deep as with a cloak. The waters stood above the mountains.

kikuyu: Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Cooka kuona, gwĩtĩkia gwaku nĩkuo gwatũma ũhone.”
english: Jesus said to him, “Receive your sight. Your faith has healed you.”

kikuyu: Nĩngaiyũria thĩ na thakame yaku ĩyo ĩratherera o nginya irĩma-inĩ, nayo mĩkuru ĩiyũre nyama ciaku.
english: But if the watchman sees the sword come and doesn’t blow the trumpet, and  Sheol is the place of the dead.

kikuyu: Ta ũrĩa mũrango ũtindaga ũkĩgarũrũka ihocio-inĩ ciaguo, noguo kĩgũũta gĩtindaga gĩkĩĩgarũra gĩkomete ũrĩrĩ-inĩ wakĩo.
english: As clouds and wind without rain, so is he who boasts of gifts deceptively.

kikuyu: Kaĩ andũ acio mekagĩra kĩyo kĩnene nĩguo mahithe Jehova mĩbango yao marĩ na haaro-ĩ! O acio marutagĩra mawĩra mao nduma-inĩ, mageciiria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũratuona?” ningĩ-rĩ, “Nũũ ũngĩmenya ũrĩa tũreka?”
english: But he who is spiritual discerns all things, and he himself is to be judged by no one.

kikuyu: Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga ĩrũũge ta ngigĩ, ĩkahahũra andũ na mũtiihĩre wayo wa mwĩtĩĩo?
english: Surely the mountains produce food for him, where all the animals of the field play.

kikuyu: Cookeria mũndũ mũkĩĩgu kũringana na ũrimũ wake, nĩguo ndakeyone taarĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ maitho-inĩ make.
english: Answer a fool according to his folly, lest he be wise in his own eyes.

kikuyu: Itũũra rĩa Gaza nĩrĩgatiganĩrio, narĩo itũũra rĩa Ashikeloni rĩanangwo. Andũ a Ashidodi makaarutũrũrwo mũthenya barigici, narĩo itũũra rĩa Ekironi rĩthario ta mũtĩ ũkũmunywo.
english: For Gaza will be forsaken, and Ashkelon a desolation. They will drive out  “Yahweh” is God’s proper Name, sometimes rendered “LORD” (all caps) in other translations.  The word translated “Lord” is “Adonai.”

kikuyu: Angĩona atĩ ndangĩhota kũmũtooria, angĩtũmĩra mũthamaki ũcio ũngĩ andũ arĩ o kũraya mathiĩ makamũũrie kũgĩe na thayũ.
english: He said to them, “Go and tell that fox, ‘Behold, I cast out demons and perform cures today and tomorrow, and the third day I complete my mission.

kikuyu: kũrĩa gwatũmire ndĩmookĩrĩre nginya ngĩmatwarithia bũrũri wa thũ ciao, thuutha ũcio rĩrĩa ngoro icio ciao nyũmũ ikenyiihia na ciĩtĩkĩre ihũũra rĩa mehia mao-rĩ,
english: I also walked contrary to them, and brought them into the land of their enemies; if then their uncircumcised heart is humbled, and they then accept the punishment of their iniquity,

kikuyu: Igai rĩa Juda * 14:1 Eliazaru aarĩ mũrũ wa Harũni. † 14:4 Jakubu nĩoire Manase na Efiraimu, ciana cia Jusufu, na akĩmatua ciana ciake ( ); ũndũ ũyũ nĩguo watũmire Jakubu amagaĩre igai ta ciana ciake.
english: 1 The lot for the tribe of the children of Judah according to their families was to the border of Edom, even to the wilderness of Zin southward, at the uttermost part of the south.

kikuyu: nĩgeetha, “ ‘matũũre maroraga no makaaga kuona, na matũũre maiguaga na matimenye ũndũ; nĩguo hihi matikae kũgarũrũka marekerwo mehia mao!’ ”
english: He sternly warned them that they should not make him known.

kikuyu: Ũguo noguo, mũndũ o wothe wanyu angĩaga kũrekia indo ciothe iria arĩ nacio, ndangĩtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa.
english: Nevertheless I must go on my way today and tomorrow and the next day, for it can’t be that a prophet would perish outside of Jerusalem.’

kikuyu: Ti-itherũ mũndũ mwaganu ndakaaga kũherithio, no andũ arĩa athingu nĩmakahonokio.
english: Most certainly, the evil man will not be unpunished, but the offspring† of the righteous will be delivered.

kikuyu: aikia a mĩguĩ ake nĩmandigiicĩirie. Aratheeca higo ciakwa atarĩ na tha, na agaita maaĩ makwa ma nyongo thĩ.
english: that you turn your spirit against God, and let such words go out of your mouth?

kikuyu: Paũlũ Kũnyiitwo Rĩrĩa matukũ macio mũgwanja maakuhĩrĩirie gũthira-rĩ, Ayahudi amwe moimĩte bũrũri wa Asia makĩona Paũlũ hekarũ-inĩ. Magĩthogotha kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe na makĩmũnyiita,
english: When the seven days were almost completed, the Jews from Asia, when they saw him in the temple, stirred up all the multitude and laid hands on him,

kikuyu: no nginya njarie hũũcũke, no nginya ndumũre mĩromo yakwa njookie ũhoro.
english: I will speak, that I may be refreshed. I will open my lips and answer.

kikuyu: “ ‘Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ arĩrehagĩra Jehova iruta rĩa ngano-rĩ, iruta rĩake no nginya rĩkorwo rĩrĩ rĩa mũtu ũrĩa mũhinyu mũno. Nĩaũitĩrĩrie maguta na awĩkĩre ũbani,
english: Yahweh† called to Moses, and spoke to him from the Tent of Meeting, saying,

kikuyu: Thuutha wa mbũtũ icio cia ita cia andũ a Babuloni kwehera kũu Jerusalemu nĩ ũndũ wa mbũtũ cia Firaũni,
english: When the army of the Chaldeans had withdrawn from Jerusalem for fear of Pharaoh’s army,

kikuyu: Tondũ wa ũrĩa ndĩracaaya nyanĩrĩire, hĩnjĩte ngatigara o gĩkonde na mahĩndĩ.
english: By reason of the voice of my groaning, my bones stick to my skin.

kikuyu: Ciana ciake nĩigatuĩka cia bata bũrũri-inĩ; rũciaro rwa arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩrũkarathimwo.
english: The chief priests and the scribes sought how they might put him to death, for they feared the people.

kikuyu: Tondũ ũcio, nĩnyambĩrĩirie gũkũniina, na ngambĩrĩria gũkwananga nĩ ũndũ wa mehia manyu.
english: Therefore I also have struck you with a grievous wound. I have made you desolate because of your sins.

kikuyu: O na kũrĩ o ũguo, andũ aingĩ makĩmwĩtĩkia. Makiuga atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Kristũ agooka-rĩ, nĩakaringa ciama nyingĩ gũkĩra mũndũ ũyũ?”
english: Jesus therefore said to those Jews who had believed him, “If you remain in my word, then you are truly my disciples.

kikuyu: Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Magetha nĩ maingĩ, no aruti a wĩra nĩ anini. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, thaithai Mwathani wa magetha atũme aruti wĩra mathiĩ magetha-inĩ make.
english: that you should remember the words which were spoken before by the holy prophets and the commandment of us, the apostles of the Lord and Savior,

kikuyu: Rũciinĩ rũrũ rũngĩ, Balamu agĩũkĩra, akĩĩra anene acio a Balaki atĩrĩ, “Cookai bũrũri wanyu kĩũmbe, nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩarega kũnjĩtĩkĩria tũthiĩ na inyuĩ.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio anene a Moabi magĩcooka kũrĩ Balaki makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Balamu nĩarega gũũka na ithuĩ.” Ningĩ Balaki agĩtũma anene angĩ aingĩ makĩria na maarĩ igweta gũkĩra acio a mbere. Nao magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Balamu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ: “Ũũ nĩguo Balaki mũrũ wa Ziporu ekuuga: Ndũgetĩkĩre ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũgirie ũũke kũrĩ niĩ,
english: From there they traveled, and encamped on the other side of the Arnon, which is in the wilderness that comes out of the border of the Amorites; for the Arnon is the border of Moab, between Moab and the Amorites.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maiguire ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa arĩa akuũ, amwe ao magĩtheka, no angĩ makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũkwenda gũkũigua ũkĩaria ũhoro ũcio hĩndĩ ĩngĩ.”
english: Now when they heard of the resurrection of the dead, some mocked; but others said, “We want to hear you again concerning this.”

kikuyu: Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, rũciaro rũrũ rũtigaathira nginya maũndũ macio mothe makaahingio.
english: Most certainly I say to you, this generation‡ will not pass away until all these things happen.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo nao Ayahudi makĩambĩrĩria gũkararania mũno o ene, makoorania atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ angĩhota atĩa gũtũhe mwĩrĩ wake tũrĩe?”
english: The Jews therefore contended with one another, saying, “How can this man give us his flesh to eat?”

kikuyu: “Andũ maathikagĩrĩria marĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro, meetagĩrĩra kĩrĩra gĩakwa makirĩte.
english: “Men listened to me, waited, and kept silence for my counsel.

kikuyu: O acio nĩo Ngai oonire arĩ wega kũmenyithia hitho ya ũtonga ũrĩa ũrĩ riiri kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ, nayo hitho ĩyo nĩ atĩ Kristũ arĩ thĩinĩ wanyu, o we kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩa gũkaagĩa na riiri.
english: to whom God was pleased to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.

kikuyu: “Nĩmagacooka kuo, na meeherie mĩhiano ĩyo yakuo mĩthũku yothe, na mĩhianano ĩyo ĩrĩ magigi.
english: Yahweh’s glory went out from over the threshold of the house and stood over the cherubim.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ, mwetirwo nĩguo mũgĩe na wĩyathi. No rĩrĩ, mũtikahũthĩre wĩyathi wanyu kũrũmagĩrĩra merirĩria ma mwĩrĩ, no handũ ha ũguo-rĩ, tungatanagĩrai inyuĩ-ene mũrĩ na wendani.
english: For even they who receive circumcision don’t keep the law themselves, but they desire to have you circumcised, so that they may boast in your flesh.

kikuyu: MARŨA MA PAŨLŨ KŨRĨ AKOLOSAI Nĩ niĩ Paũlũ, mũtũmwo wa Kristũ Jesũ nĩ ũndũ wa wendo wa Ngai, tũrĩ hamwe na Timotheo mũrũ wa Ithe witũ,
english: Paul, an apostle of Christ† Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy our brother,

kikuyu: Nĩndekĩra mũkũnga-mbura wakwa matu-inĩ, na nĩguo ũgũtuĩka kĩmenyithia gĩa kĩrĩkanĩro gatagatĩ gakwa na andũ a thĩ.
english: Mizraim became the father of Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,

kikuyu: ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Akorwo nĩwe Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi, wĩhonokie.” Na nĩ haarĩ maandĩko maandĩkĩtwo igũrũ rĩake atĩrĩ: ŨYŨ NĨWE MŨTHAMAKI WA AYAHUDI.
english: and saying, “If you are the King of the Jews, save yourself!”

kikuyu: Ngeragĩria njĩra-inĩ cia maathani maku, nĩgũkorwo nĩmo ngenagĩra.
english: Direct me in the path of your commandments, for I delight in them.

kikuyu: Ndaarĩ mũnini, na rĩu ndĩ mũkũrũ, no ndirĩ ndoona andũ arĩa athingu matiganĩirio, kana ciana ciao ikĩhooya irio.
english: I have been young, and now am old, yet I have not seen the righteous forsaken, nor his children begging for bread.

kikuyu: Ndaakũmenyithia mo nĩgeetha mwĩhoko waku ũkoragwo harĩ Jehova, wee nĩwe ngũruta maũndũ macio ũmũthĩ, ĩĩ wee nĩwe ngũruta.
english: I teach you today, even you, so that your trust may be in Yahweh.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo atongoria a Juda makeĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ, ‘Andũ a Jerusalemu nĩmagĩte na hinya nĩ ũndũ wa Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, o we Ngai wao.’
english: The chieftains of Judah will say in their heart, ‘The inhabitants of Jerusalem are my strength in Yahweh of Armies their God.’

kikuyu: na Hazoru-Hadata, na Keriothu-Hezironi (na norĩo Hazoru),
english: Hazor Hadattah, Kerioth Hezron (also called Hazor),

kikuyu: Andũ a Turo nĩmeyakĩire kĩĩgitĩro kĩrũmu, na makeigĩra hĩba cia betha nyingĩ ta rũkũngũ, na thahabu nyingĩ ta mahuti ma njĩra-inĩ. No rĩrĩ, Mwathani nĩakarĩtunya ũtonga warĩo, na aanange ũhoti warĩo wa iria-inĩ, narĩo itũũra rĩu nĩrĩgacinwo na mwaki.
english: Tyre built herself a stronghold, and heaped up silver like the dust, and fine gold like the mire of the streets.

kikuyu: Wohaga magũrũ makwa na mĩnyororo; ũrangagĩra njĩra ciakwa ciothe na ũndũ wa gũcora njoro makinya ma magũrũ makwa.
english: You also put my feet in the stocks, and mark all my paths. You set a bound to the soles of my feet,

kikuyu: Mũraika ũcio akĩĩra arĩa maarũngiĩ mbere yake atĩrĩ, “Mũrutei nguo icio ciake irĩ na gĩko.” Agĩcooka akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ, “Atĩrĩrĩ, nĩnjeheretie mehia maku, na nĩngũkũhumba nguo cia goro.”
english: Don’t you be like your fathers, to whom the former prophets proclaimed, saying: Yahweh of Armies says, ‘Return now from your evil ways and from your evil doings;’ but they didn’t hear nor listen to me, says Yahweh.

kikuyu: na Remethu, na Eni-Ganimu, na Eni-Hada, na Bethi-Pazezu.
english: Remeth, Engannim, En Haddah, and Beth Pazzez.

kikuyu: O rĩngĩ andũ a Isiraeli makĩrĩrĩra Jehova, nake akĩmahe mũndũ wa kũmahonokia wetagwo Ehudu, warĩ wa kĩmotho; mũrũ wa Gera ũrĩa Mũbenjamini. Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩmũtũma na irĩhi rĩa igooti * 3:13 Andũ a Amoni na a Moabi maarĩ njiaro cia Loti ( ), nao Amaleki maarĩ njiaro cia Esaũ ( , 16). Andũ aya nĩo maahakanĩte na andũ a Isiraeli, na nĩo maarĩ thũ ciao iria njũru.
english: Wherever they went out, Yahweh’s hand was against them for evil, as Yahweh had spoken, and as Yahweh had sworn to them; and they were very distressed.

kikuyu: Andũ a Kushi na Putu, na Ludu, na Arabia guothe, na Lubia, na andũ a bũrũri wa kĩrĩkanĩro, makooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora marĩ hamwe na andũ a Misiri.
english: Therefore its stature was exalted above all the trees of the field; and its boughs were multiplied. Its branches became long by reason of many waters, when it spread them out.

kikuyu: O ta ũrĩa tũmwĩrĩte, o na rĩu nĩ nguuga o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, mũndũ o wothe angĩmũhunjĩria ũhoro mwega ũngĩ tiga ũrĩa mwetĩkirie-rĩ, aronyiitwo nĩ kĩrumi nginya tene!
english: As we have said before, so I now say again: if any man preaches to you any “good news” other than that which you received, let him be cursed.

kikuyu: Akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũkwĩra ũrĩa gũkaahaana thuutha-inĩ hĩndĩ ya mangʼũrĩ, tondũ rĩrĩ, kĩoneki gĩkĩ gĩkoniĩ mahinda marĩa maathĩrĩirio ma ithirĩro.
english: “Then I desired to know the truth concerning the fourth animal, which was different from all of them, exceedingly terrible, whose teeth were of iron, and its nails of bronze; which devoured, broke in pieces, and stamped the residue with its feet;

kikuyu: niĩ ndĩ thĩinĩ wao, nawe ũrĩ thĩinĩ wakwa. Marotuĩka ũmwe kũna, nĩgeetha andũ a gũkũ thĩ mamenye atĩ nĩwe wandũmire, na atĩ nĩũmendete o ta ũrĩa ũnyendete.
english: I in them, and you in me, that they may be perfected into one, that the world may know that you sent me and loved them, even as you loved me.

kikuyu: Andũ othe arĩa maathiire na Jakubu Misiri, arĩa maarĩ a njiaro ciake tũtegũtara atumia a ariũ ake, maarĩ andũ mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na atandatũ.
english: All the souls who came with Jacob into Egypt, who were his direct offspring, in addition to Jacob’s sons’ wives, all the souls were sixty-six.

kikuyu: nĩgeetha andũ mone na mamenye, mecũũranie na mataũkĩrwo, atĩ nĩ guoko kwa Jehova gwĩkĩte maũndũ macio, na atĩ Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli nĩwe wamĩũmbire.”
english: that they may see, know, consider, and understand together, that Yahweh’s hand has done this, and the Holy One of Israel has created it.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ mwarehe andũ aya haha, o na gũtuĩka ti kũiya maiyĩte indo cia hekarũ, kana makaruma ngai iitũ ya mũndũ-wa-nja.
english: For you have brought these men here, who are neither robbers of temples nor blasphemers of your goddess.

kikuyu: “Hĩndĩ ĩyo, o ta ũrĩa Jehova aakoretwo anjĩĩra-rĩ, Hanameli mũrũ wa mama agĩũka kũrĩ niĩ kũu nja ĩrĩa ĩikaragio nĩ arangĩri, akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Wĩgũrĩre mũgũnda wakwa ũrĩa ũrĩ Anathothu, bũrũri-inĩ wa Benjamini. Nĩgũkorwo wee nĩwe ũrĩ na kĩhooto gĩa kũũkũũra ũtuĩke waku, wĩgũrĩre ũtuĩke waku.’ “Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩmenya ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo yoimĩte kũrĩ Jehova;
english: “So Hanamel my uncle’s son came to me in the court of the guard according to Yahweh’s word, and said to me, ‘Please buy my field that is in Anathoth, which is in the land of Benjamin; for the right of inheritance is yours, and the redemption is yours. Buy it for yourself.’ “Then I knew that this was Yahweh’s word. -34  TR adds “tabernacle”

kikuyu: Magĩcooka makĩhũũra andũ acio maarĩ nja ya mũrango wa nyũmba, ethĩ na akũrũ, na ũtumumu nĩgeetha mage kuona mũrango.
english: They struck the men who were at the door of the house with blindness, both small and great, so that they wearied themselves to find the door.

kikuyu: Tigaga gũthĩĩnĩka ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa mekaga ũũru, o na kana ũiguage ũiru nĩ ũndũ wa arĩa mekaga mahĩtia;
english: Don’t fret because of evildoers, neither be envious against those who work unrighteousness.

kikuyu: Ndũkanacookerie mũndũ mũkĩĩgu kũringana na ũrimũ wake, ndũkae gũtuĩka take.
english: Don’t answer a fool according to his folly, lest you also be like him.

kikuyu: Ũhoro ũcio ndiaheirwo nĩ mũndũ, o na kana ngĩthomithio nĩ mũndũ; no nĩ kũguũrĩrio ndaguũrĩirio Ũhoro ũcio nĩ Jesũ Kristũ.
english: For I didn’t receive it from man, nor was I taught it, but it came to me through revelation of Jesus Christ.

kikuyu: Nakuo kũu Jeriko nĩ kwarĩ mũndũ wetagwo Zakayo; warĩ mũnene wa etia mbeeca cia igooti na aarĩ gĩtonga.
english: There was a man named Zacchaeus. He was a chief tax collector, and he was rich.

kikuyu: naruo rũrĩrĩ rũtarĩ tha o na hanini, rũgakĩria iria ingĩ gũthũka, rũkĩũtema, rũkĩũtiga wagũa. Mathĩgĩ maguo makĩgũa irĩma-igũrũ na mĩkuru-inĩ guothe; nacio honge ciaguo ikĩgũa ciunĩkangĩire kũu ituamba-inĩ ciothe cia bũrũri. Ndũrĩrĩ ciothe cia thĩ ikĩehera kĩĩruru-inĩ kĩaguo, igĩtigana naguo.
english: I will cause your multitude to fall by the swords of the mighty. They are all the ruthless of the nations. They will bring the pride of Egypt to nothing, and all its multitude will be destroyed.

kikuyu: “Ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩĩgũithia thĩ, ĩkĩmĩthaitha, ĩkĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ngirĩrĩria, na nĩndĩĩkũrĩha.’
english: “So his fellow servant fell down at his feet and begged him, saying, ‘Have patience with me, and I will repay you!’

kikuyu: Nĩngekĩra moko ma mũthamaki wa Babuloni hinya, na ndĩmũnengere rũhiũ rwakwa rwa njora arũnyiite na guoko, no nĩngoina moko ma Firaũni, nake acaaĩre hau mbere yake, o ta mũndũ ũgurarĩtio nguraro ya gĩkuũ.
english: I will strengthen the arms of the king of Babylon, and put my sword in his hand; but I will break the arms of Pharaoh, and he will groan before the king of Babylon with the groaning of a mortally wounded man.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ ene no mũheane ũira muuge atĩ nĩndoigire atĩrĩ, ‘Niĩ ti niĩ Kristũ, no ndũmĩtwo njũke mbere yake.’
english: Now, little children, remain in him, that when he appears, we may have boldness and not be ashamed before him at his coming.

kikuyu: ngĩcineana kũrĩ Baruku mũrũ wa Neria, mũrũ wa Maaseia, mbere ya Hanameli mũrũ wa mama, na mbere ya aira arĩa meekĩrĩte kĩrore marũa-inĩ macio ma ũgũri wa gĩthaka, o na Ayahudi othe arĩa maikarĩte hau nja ĩrĩa ĩikaragio nĩ arangĩri.
english: They will come and sing in the height of Zion, and will flow to the goodness of Yahweh, to the grain, to the new wine, to the oil, and to the young of the flock and of the herd. Their soul will be as a watered garden. They will not sorrow any more at all.

kikuyu: Niĩ nĩhĩtĩtie njĩra ta ngʼondu yũrĩte. Gĩcarie ndungata yaku, nĩgũkorwo ndiriganĩirwo nĩ maathani maku.
english: I have gone astray like a lost sheep. Seek your servant, for I don’t forget your commandments.

kikuyu: Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiumĩrĩra arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe makĩrĩa irio; akĩmatetia nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga gwĩtĩkia na nĩ ũndũ wa ũmũ wa ngoro ciao, nĩ ũndũ wa kũrega gwĩtĩkia arĩa maamuonete thuutha wa kũriũka gwake.
english: Afterward he was revealed to the eleven themselves as they sat at the table; and he rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart, because they didn’t believe those who had seen him after he had risen.

kikuyu: Nebuzaradani ũcio mũnene wa arangĩri akĩmakuua othe, akĩmatwarĩra mũthamaki wa Babuloni kũu Ribila.
english: Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard took them, and brought them to the king of Babylon to Riblah.

kikuyu: Loti akiuma na nja amatũnge, na akĩhinga mũrango,
english: Lot went out to them through the door, and shut the door after himself.

kikuyu: Theria betha ĩthire gĩko, na nĩhegũtigara kĩndũ kĩa mũturi wa betha;
english: Take away the dross from the silver, and material comes out for the refiner.

kikuyu: Uugaga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ thuuraga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa njagĩrĩru; nĩ niĩ nduanagĩra ciira na kĩhooto.
english: His tabernacle is also in Salem. His dwelling place in Zion.

kikuyu: nao andũ arĩa akũũre a Jehova nĩmagacooka. Magaatoonya Zayuni makĩinaga; nao nĩmageekĩrwo thũmbĩ ya gĩkeno gĩa tene na tene. Magaakena na macanjamũke, nakĩo kĩeha o na mũcaayo nĩigathira biũ.
english: Have I come up now without Yahweh against this land to destroy it? Yahweh said to me, “Go up against this land, and destroy it.” ’ ”

kikuyu: “Rĩrĩa mũirĩtu ũrĩ gwa ithe mũciĩ angĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa kũrĩ Jehova, kana ehinge na mũhingo na ũndũ wa kĩĩranĩro,
english: You shall tell them, ‘This is the offering made by fire which you shall offer to Yahweh: male lambs a year old without defect, two day by day, for a continual burnt offering.

kikuyu: Ha ũhoro wa andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ arĩa metĩkĩtie-rĩ, nĩtwamandĩkĩire, tũkĩmamenyithia itua riitũ, atĩ o metheeme kũrĩa irio iria irutĩirwo mĩhianano, na thakame, na nyama cia nyamũ cia gũitwo, o na ũmaraya.”
english: “Now, behold, I know that you all, among whom I went about preaching God’s Kingdom, will see my face no more.

kikuyu: Nginya ũmũthĩ, matirĩ menyiihia, kana makaahe gĩtĩĩo, kana makarũmĩrĩra watho wakwa, o na kana uuge wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo ũrĩa ndaamũheire inyuĩ na maithe manyu.
english: They are not humbled even to this day, neither have they feared, nor walked in my law, nor in my statutes, that I set before you and before your fathers.’

kikuyu: 1 Roho wakwa nĩmũthuthĩku, matukũ makwa nĩmathirĩte, mbĩrĩra nĩyo ĩnjetereire.
english: 1 “My spirit is consumed. My days are extinct and the grave is ready for me.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩehĩtĩte akĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩake, akoiga atĩrĩ: Ti-itherũ nĩngatũma ũũkĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ aingĩ o ta mĩrumbĩ ya ngigĩ, nao makuugĩrĩrie nĩ ũndũ wa gũkũhoota.
english: All the army of the Chaldeans, who were with the captain of the guard, broke

kikuyu: Oima kũu-rĩ, agĩthiĩ agĩtoonya thunagogi yao,
english: He departed from there and went into their synagogue.

kikuyu: Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio o rĩu matanekĩka nĩgeetha rĩrĩa magekĩka mũgeetĩkia.
english: Now I have told you before it happens so that when it happens, you may believe.

kikuyu: Mũndũ mũtaana we mwene nĩakarathimwo, tondũ nĩagayagĩra arĩa athĩĩni irio ciake.
english: It is better to dwell in the corner of the housetop than to share a house with a contentious woman.

kikuyu: “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ, nĩngwenda mũmenye atĩ ũhonokio wa Ngai nĩũtũmĩtwo kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ, nao nĩmegũthikĩrĩria!” 29(Na aarĩkia kuuga ũguo-rĩ, Ayahudi magĩthiĩ magĩkararanagia mũno o ene.) Na kwa ihinda rĩa mĩaka ĩĩrĩ mĩgima, Paũlũ agĩikara kũu, arĩ nyũmba yake ya gũkombora, na akanyiitaga ũgeni andũ arĩa othe mokaga kũmuona.
english: “Be it known therefore to you that the salvation of God is sent to the nations, and they will listen.”  The word for “brothers” here and where context allows may also be correctly translated “brothers and sisters” or “siblings.”

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo Ũcio ũrĩ Hinya nĩanjĩkĩire maũndũ manene, narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩ rĩtheru.
english: For he who is mighty has done great things for me. Holy is his name.

kikuyu: Rũrĩmĩ rwa mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ rũgaathagĩrĩria ũmenyo, no kanua ka mũndũ mũkĩĩgu gathothokaga ũrimũ.
english: All the ways of a man are clean in his own eyes, but Yahweh weighs the motives.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ndũkanatoonye mũciĩ ũrĩ na ndĩa ya mathiko; ndũgathiĩ gũcakayakanagũcaayanĩra, nĩũndũnĩnjeheretiekĩrathimogĩakwa, nawendowakwa, onathaciakwa harĩ andũ aya,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga. 6“Andũ othe, anene na arĩa anini, nĩmagakuĩra bũrũri-inĩ ũyũ. Matigaathikwo kana macakaĩrwo, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgetiihangia kana enjwo mũtwe* nĩ ũndũ wao.
english: For Yahweh says, “Don’t enter into the house of mourning. Don’t go to lament. Don’t bemoan them, for I have taken away my peace from this people,” says Yahweh, “even loving kindness and tender mercies.

kikuyu: Twarĩ andũ ikũmi na eerĩ, ariũ a mũthuuri ũmwe. Ũmwe ndarĩ ho, na ũrĩa mũnini biũ arĩ na ithe witũ kũu Kaanani.’
english: We are twelve brothers, sons of our father; one is no more, and the youngest is today with our father in the land of Canaan.’

kikuyu: higo cierĩ hamwe na maguta marĩa macihumbĩire hakuhĩ na honge, na marĩa mahumbĩire ini, amarutanĩrie na higo icio. Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩagacicinĩra kĩgongona-inĩ irĩ irio, rĩĩrĩ nĩ iruta rĩrutĩirwo Jehova rĩa gũcinwo na mwaki.
english: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the loins, and the cover on the liver, with the kidneys, he shall take away.

kikuyu: Maruta manyu marĩtuĩkaga ta ngano ĩrĩa ĩrutĩtwo kĩhuhĩro-inĩ, kana ndibei ĩrĩa ĩrutĩtwo kĩhihĩro-inĩ.
english: Your wave offering shall be credited to you, as though it were the grain of the threshing floor, and as the fullness of the wine press.

kikuyu: Iherithia rĩtarĩ rĩa tha rĩetereire mũndũ ũrĩa ũtigĩte njĩra, na mũndũ ũrĩa ũthũire kũrũngwo nĩagaakua.
english: Inspired judgments are on the lips of the king. He shall not betray his mouth.

kikuyu: “Ũndũ mũũru mũno na wa kũmakania nĩwĩkĩkĩte bũrũri-inĩ ũyũ:
english: “An astonishing and horrible thing has happened in the land.

kikuyu: O ta ũrĩa mwaki ũmundagia thari ikarĩrĩmbũka, na ũgatũma maaĩ matherũke-rĩ, ikũrũka thĩ ũtũme rĩĩtwa rĩaku rĩmenywo nĩ thũ ciaku, na ũtũme ndũrĩrĩ ciinaine irĩ mbere yaku!
english: I have spread out my hands all day to a rebellious people, who walk in a way that is not good, after their own thoughts;

kikuyu: “ ‘Ũrĩrĩ o wothe mũndũ ũcio ũkuura angĩkomera nĩũkanyiitwo nĩ thaahu, na kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa angĩikarĩra nĩgĩkanyiitwo nĩ thaahu.
english: “ ‘Every bed on which he who has the discharge lies shall be unclean; and everything he sits on shall be unclean.

kikuyu: “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga andũ arĩa marĩ na mĩnyamaro maheo ũtheri, naguo muoyo ũkaheo arĩa marĩ na ruo rwa ngoro,
english: Between morning and evening they are destroyed. They perish forever without any regarding it.

kikuyu: “Rĩu ndĩroka kũrĩ wee, no maũndũ maya ndĩroiga ndĩ o gũkũ thĩ, nĩguo maiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno gĩakwa kĩrĩ gĩkinyanĩru kũna thĩinĩ wao.
english: However, when he, the Spirit of truth, has come, he will guide you into all truth, for he will not speak from himself; but whatever he hears, he will speak. He will declare to you things that are coming.

kikuyu: Thuutha wa andũ acio kuumio nja, agĩtoonya thĩinĩ, akĩnyiita mũirĩtu ũcio guoko, nake agĩũkĩra.
english: It is enough for the disciple that he be like his teacher, and the servant like his lord. If they have called the master of the house Beelzebul,§ how much more those of his household!

kikuyu: “Nĩwe ndĩrakaĩra, o Wee Ngai, no ndũranjĩtĩka; ndĩrarũgama, no wee no kũndora ũrandora.
english: I cry to you, and you do not answer me. I stand up, and you gaze at me.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Paũlũ aakinyire ngathĩ-inĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩgĩthũka mũno o nginya Paũlũ agĩkuuo nĩ thigari.
english: When he came to the stairs, he was carried by the soldiers because of the violence of the crowd;

kikuyu: “Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa athingu nĩmakamũcookeria mamũũrie atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani, nĩ rĩ twakuonire ũrĩ mũhũũtu tũgĩkũhe gĩa kũrĩa, kana ũrĩ mũnyootu tũgĩkũhe gĩa kũnyua? Na nĩ rĩ twakuonire ũrĩ mũgeni tũgĩkũnyiita ũgeni, kana ũrĩ njaga tũgĩkũhe nguo?
english: “Then the righteous will answer him, saying, ‘Lord, when did we see you hungry and feed you, or thirsty and give you a drink?

kikuyu: Thamaki cia iria-inĩ, na nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ, na nyamũ cia gĩthaka, na kanyamũ o gothe karĩa gathiiagĩra thĩ, o na andũ othe arĩa marĩ gũkũ thĩ nĩmakainaina maanyona. Irĩma nĩikangʼaũranio, na hurũrũka nĩikaragana, o na rũthingo o ruothe nĩrũkamomoka.
english: You shall be filled at my table with horses and charioteers, with mighty men, and with all men of war,” says the Lord Yahweh.’

kikuyu: ‡ 41:2 nĩ ta mita igĩrĩ na nuthu (2:5) § 41:2 nĩ ta mita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na nuthu (20:5) * 41:2 nĩ ta mita ikũmi na robo (10:25) † 41:3 nĩ ta mita
english: Then he measured the wall of the house, six cubits; and the width of every side room, four cubits, all around the house on every side.

kikuyu: Tahai betha! Tahai thahabu! Ũtonga ũrĩa ũrĩ igĩĩna-inĩ ciao ciothe ndũngĩthira!
english: All of them come for violence. Their hordes face forward. They gather prisoners like sand.

kikuyu: Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia ũcio mũnabii ĩkoniĩ Elamu, o kĩambĩrĩria- inĩ kĩa wathani wa Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda:
english: Yahweh’s word that came to Jeremiah the prophet concerning Elam, in the beginning of the reign of Zedekiah king of Judah, saying,

kikuyu: O na ningĩ ndungata ciakwa nĩikaina nĩgũcanjamũka ngoro, no inyuĩ nĩmũkarĩra nĩ ũndũ wa ruo rwa ngoro, na mũgirĩke nĩ ũndũ wa gũthuthĩka ngoro.
english: Behold, my servants will sing for joy of heart, but you will cry for sorrow of heart, and will wail for anguish of spirit.

kikuyu: Oha mĩrigo yaku ya gũthiĩ nayo kũrĩa ũgaatahwo, ũtwarwo, wee ũtũũraga bũrũri wa Misiri, nĩgũkorwo Nofu gũkaanangwo, kwage kĩndũ, o na gũkire ihooru, gũtarĩ mũndũ wa gũgũtũũra.
english: You daughter who dwells in Egypt, furnish yourself to go into captivity; for Memphis will become a desolation, and will be burned up, without inhabitant.

kikuyu: O na gũtirĩ mũndũ thuutha wa kũnyua ndibei ngũrũ ũcookaga kwenda ndibei ĩyo ya mũhihano, nĩ ũndũ oigaga atĩrĩ, ‘Ĩrĩa ngũrũ nĩyo njega.’ ”
english: No man having drunk old wine immediately desires new, for he says, ‘The old is better.’ ”

kikuyu: higo cierĩ hamwe na maguta marĩa macihumbĩire hakuhĩ na honge, na maguta marĩa mahumbĩire ini, amarutanĩrie na higo icio. Nao ariũ a Harũni macicinĩre kĩgongona-inĩ igũrũ, ciigĩrĩirwo igũrũ rĩa iruta rĩu rĩa njino rĩrĩa narĩo rĩigĩrĩirwo igũrũ rĩa ngũ irakana, rĩrĩ iruta rĩa gũcinwo na mwaki, rĩrĩ na mũtararĩko mwega wa gũkenia Jehova.
english: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the loins, and the cover on the liver, with the kidneys, he shall take away.

kikuyu: “ ‘No mangĩkoimbũra mehia mao na mehia ma maithe mao, o na mehia ma kũnemera na ma kũnjũkĩrĩra,
english: “ ‘If they confess their iniquity and the iniquity of their fathers, in their trespass which they trespassed against me; and also that because they walked contrary to me,

kikuyu: Macumĩkagĩra mĩgũnda makamĩtunyana, na makeerirĩria nyũmba magacioya na hinya. Maheenagia mũndũ makamũtunya mũciĩ wake, makaheenia mũndũ wao, makamũtunya igai rĩake. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Nĩndĩrathugunda mwanangĩko wa gũũkĩrĩra andũ aya, ũrĩa mũtakahota kwĩhonokia. Mũtigacooka gũthiiaga na mwĩtĩĩo, nĩgũkorwo ihinda rĩu nĩ rĩa mũtino.
english: They covet fields and seize them, and houses, then take them away. They oppress a man and his house,  “Yahweh” is God’s proper Name, sometimes rendered “LORD” (all caps) in other translations.  The word translated “Lord” is “Adonai.”  “Behold”, from “הִ ͏נֵּה”, means look at, take notice, observe, see, or gaze at. It is often used as an interjection.  Beth Ophrah means literally “House of Dust.”

kikuyu: Nĩngarĩĩkanĩra kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa thayũ nao; nakĩo gĩgaatuĩka kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra nginya tene. Nĩngamahaanda na ndũme maingĩhe, na nĩngahaanda handũ- hakwa-harĩa-haamũre gatagatĩ-inĩ kao nginya tene. Ningĩ gĩikaro gĩakwa gĩgaatũũra hamwe nao; nĩngatuĩka Ngai wao, nao matuĩke andũ akwa.
english: Moreover I will make a covenant of peace with them. It will be an everlasting covenant with them. I will place them, multiply them, and will set my sanctuary among them forever more.

kikuyu: “ ‘Ngai ekuuga atĩrĩ, matukũ-inĩ ma kũrigĩrĩria nĩngaitĩrĩria andũ othe Roho wakwa. Ariũ na aarĩ anyu nĩmakarathaga mohoro, Aanake anyu nĩmakonaga cioneki, nao athuuri anyu marootage irooto.
english: ‘It will be in the last days, says God, that I will pour out my Spirit on all flesh. Your sons and your daughters will prophesy. Your young men will see visions. Your old men will dream dreams.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aitĩrĩirie mwĩrĩ wakwa maguta macio manungi wega, eekire ũguo nĩgeetha aathagathage ũrĩa ngaathikwo.
english: For in pouring this ointment on my body, she did it to prepare me for burial.

kikuyu: Maũndũ macio mothe ndamatuĩririe na ũũgĩ, ngiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩnduĩte itua rĩa kũgĩa na ũũgĩ.” No rĩrĩ, ũndũ ũcio warĩ kũraya na niĩ.
english: Her husband is respected in the gates, when he sits among the elders of the land.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova, Ngai waku, ũrĩa ũkũnyiitaga guoko kwa ũrĩo, na agakwĩra atĩrĩ, Tiga gwĩtigĩra; nĩngũgũteithia.
english: For I, Yahweh your God, will hold your right hand, saying to you, ‘Don’t be afraid. I will help you.’

kikuyu: Wee ũmomorete thingo ciake ciothe na ũkaananga ciĩhitho ciake iria cia hinya.
english: You have broken down all his hedges. You have brought his strongholds to ruin.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa maakuuĩte ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro maikarire marũngiĩ hau gatagatĩ ka Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ meekire maũndũ marĩa mothe Jehova aathĩte Joshua, na magĩĩkwo o ta ũrĩa Musa aathĩte Joshua mekwo. Nao andũ magĩkĩhiũha, makĩringa mũrĩmo,
english: For we have heard how Yahweh dried up the water of the Red Sea before you, when you came out of Egypt; and what you did to the two kings of the Amorites, who were beyond the Jordan, to Sihon and to Og, whom you utterly destroyed.

kikuyu: Ndigũtũũra ndũithanagia nginya tene, o na kana ndũũre ndakarĩte hĩndĩ ciothe, tondũ roho wa mũndũ wahota kũringĩka mbere yakwa, mĩhũmũ ĩyo ya mũndũ ũcio ndoombire ĩhwererekere.
english: For I will not contend forever, neither will I always be angry; for the spirit would faint before me, and the souls whom I have made.

kikuyu: Ta thikĩrĩriai ũrĩa Jehova ekuuga: “Ũkĩrai mwĩciirĩrĩre mbere ya irĩma; mũreke tũrĩma tũigue ũrĩa mũkuuga.
english: You will beat in pieces many peoples. I will devote their gain to Yahweh, and their substance to the Lord of the whole earth.

kikuyu: Gũtirĩ handũ harĩ nduma, kana handũ harĩ kĩĩruru kĩnene, hangĩĩhithwo nĩ arĩa meekaga ũũru.
english: There is no darkness, nor thick gloom, where the workers of iniquity may hide themselves.

kikuyu: Ndũrĩrĩ icio nĩcio ici: aathani arĩa atano a Afilisti, na Akaanani othe, na Asidoni, na Ahivi arĩa maatũũraga irĩma-inĩ cia Lebanoni kuuma Kĩrĩma kĩa Baali-Herimoni o nginya Lebo-Hamathu.
english: the five lords of the Philistines, all the Canaanites, the Sidonians, and the Hivites who lived on Mount Lebanon, from Mount Baal Hermon to the entrance of Hamath.

kikuyu: “ ‘Na rĩrĩ, mwĩcũraniei wega ũhoro ũyũ kuuma ũmũthĩ, mũtaranie ũrĩa maũndũ maatariĩ mbere ya rĩrĩa gũtaarĩ ihiga rĩaigĩrĩirwo igũrũ wa rĩngĩ mwako-inĩ wa hekarũ ĩno ya Jehova.
english: Now, please consider from this day and backward, before a stone was laid on a stone in Yahweh’s temple.

kikuyu: gĩconoko gĩtigatũkinyĩrĩra.” Ningĩ nĩ kwagĩrĩire kũũranagio atĩrĩ, wee nyũmba ya Jakubu: “Kaĩ Roho wa Jehova arĩ mũrakaru? We no eke maũndũ ta macio?” “Githĩ ciugo ciakwa itigunaga mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiiaga na mĩthiĩre mĩrũngĩrĩru?
english: The seers shall be disappointed, and the diviners confounded. Yes, they shall all cover their lips, for there is no answer from God.”†

kikuyu: Kĩrĩa amomoraga gĩtingĩakwo rĩngĩ; mũndũ ũrĩa aahingĩra njeera gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩmuohora.
english: Why should I take my flesh in my teeth, and put my life in my hand?

kikuyu: Nĩathĩĩnĩkĩte mũno agĩthondekwo nĩ mandagĩtarĩ aingĩ, na akahũthĩra kĩrĩa gĩothe aakoretwo nakĩo, no handũ ha kũhona aakĩragĩrĩria o kwĩhĩrwo. Rĩrĩa aiguire ũhoro wa Jesũ, agĩũka na thuutha wake gatagatĩ-inĩ ga kĩrĩndĩ, akĩhutia nguo yake,
english: and had suffered many things by many physicians, and had spent all that she had, and was no better, but rather grew worse,

kikuyu: Nũũ ũngĩtũtigithania na wendani wa Kristũ? Anga nĩ kuona thĩĩna, kana kwĩhĩrwo nĩ ruo, kana nĩkũnyariirwo, kana ngʼaragu, kana kwaga nguo, kana ũgwati, o na kana rũhiũ rwa njora?
english: Who shall separate us from the love of Christ? Could oppression, or anguish, or persecution, or famine, or nakedness, or peril, or sword?

kikuyu: Thuutha ũcio, Joshua agĩthoma ciugo ciothe cia Watho, agĩthoma irathimo o na agĩthoma irumi, o ta ũrĩa kwaandĩkĩtwo Ibuku-inĩ rĩa Watho.
english: Afterward he read all the words of the law, the blessing and the curse, according to all that is written in the book of the law.

kikuyu: Jakubu Kwĩgĩĩra na Irathimo cia Isaaka Rĩrĩa Isaaka aakũrire na maitho make makĩaga hinya ũndũ atangĩahotire kuona-rĩ, agĩtũmanĩra Esaũ mũriũ wake ũrĩa mũkũrũ, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wakwa.” Nake Esaũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ũyũ haha.”
english: Isaac said to them, “Why have you come to me, since you hate me, and have sent me away from you?”

kikuyu: “Rĩu Firaũni nĩacarie mũndũ ũũĩ gũkũũrana maũndũ na mũndũ mũũgĩ, amũtue mũrũgamĩrĩri wa bũrũri wa Misiri.
english: “Now therefore let Pharaoh look for a discreet and wise man, and set him over the land of Egypt.

kikuyu: Harĩ Leviathani-rĩ, kĩgera no ta nyeki nyũmũ, nakĩo gĩcango no ta gĩcunjĩ kĩbuthu kĩa mũtĩ.
english: He counts iron as straw, and bronze as rotten wood.

kikuyu: Kaini na Habili Nake Adamu agĩkoma na mũtumia wake Hawa, nake akĩgĩa nda, agĩciara Kaini. Nake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ndĩkũgĩa na mwana wa kahĩĩ nĩ ũndũ wa gũteithio nĩ Jehova.”
english: Abel also brought some of the firstborn of his flock and of its fat. Yahweh respected Abel and his offering,

kikuyu: Nĩnyonete njĩra ciake, no nĩngamũhonia; ningĩ nĩngamũtongoria, na njooke ndĩmũũmĩrĩrie,
english: I have seen his ways, and will heal him. I will lead him also, and restore comforts to him and to his mourners.

kikuyu: na gategwa kamwe, na ndũrũme ĩmwe, na gatũrũme kamwe ka mwaka ũmwe, nĩ ũndũ wa iruta rĩa njino;
english: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

kikuyu: Nyamũ cia gĩthaka, ta mbwe na ndundu, nĩciiheaga gĩtĩĩo, tondũ nĩ niĩ heanaga maaĩ werũ-inĩ o na rũngʼũrĩ-inĩ, ngatũma kũgĩe na tũrũũĩ twa kũnyuuagwo nĩ andũ akwa, andũ arĩa niĩ thuurĩte,
english: The animals of the field, the jackals and the ostriches, shall honor me, because I give water in the wilderness and rivers in the desert, to give drink to my people, my chosen,

kikuyu: Mĩaka yothe ĩrĩa Kenani aatũũrire muoyo yarĩ mĩaka magana kenda na ikũmi, agĩcooka agĩkua.
english: and all of the days of Kenan were nine hundred ten years, then he died.

kikuyu: Jesũ aaragĩria kĩrĩndĩ maũndũ macio mothe na ngerekano na ndaamaragĩria ũndũ o na ũmwe atekũhũthĩra ngerekano.
english: When they had crossed over, they came to the land of Gennesaret.

kikuyu: Baba, goocithia rĩĩtwa rĩaku!” Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgambo ũkiuma igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩrĩgoocithĩtie na no ngũrĩgoocithia o rĩngĩ.”
english: Father, glorify your name!” Then a voice came out of the sky, saying, “I have both glorified it and will glorify it again.”

kikuyu: Riiri wa nyũmba ĩno ũgaakorwo ũrĩ mũnene gũkĩra riiri wa nyũmba ĩrĩa ya mbere,’ ũguo nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga. ‘Na handũ haha nĩngaheana thayũ,’ ũguo nĩguo Jehova Mwene- Hinya-Wothe ekuuga.” Irathimo cia Andũ arĩa Marĩ na Thaahu
english: ‘The latter glory of this house will be greater than the former,’ says Yahweh of Armies; ‘and in this place I will give peace,’ says Yahweh of Armies.”

kikuyu: Jehova nĩagatũma mũgambo wake ũrĩ riiri ũiguuo nĩ andũ, na nĩagatũma mone guoko gwake gũgĩikũrũka, arĩ na marakara maingĩ na mwaki wa kũniinana, hamwe na mbura ya marurumĩ, na kĩhuhũkanio, na mbura ya mbembe.
english: Yahweh will cause his glorious voice to be heard, and will show the descent of his arm, with the indignation of his anger and the flame of a devouring fire, with a blast, storm, and hailstones.

kikuyu: “Inyuĩ mũtarĩ ũũgĩ-rĩ, nĩ nginya rĩ mũgũtũũra mwendete njĩra cianyu itarĩ cia ũũgĩ? Nĩ nginya rĩ anyũrũrania megũtũũra makenagĩra kĩnyũrũri, na arĩa akĩĩgu mathũire ũmenyo?
english: But the wicked will be cut off from the land. The treacherous will be rooted out of it.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo mũthenya ũrĩa mũnene wa mangʼũrĩ mao nĩmũkinyu, nake nũũ ũngĩhota kũwĩtiiria?”
english: for the Lamb who is in the middle of the throne shepherds them and leads them to springs of life-giving waters. And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes.”

kikuyu: “Kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa kĩarĩ giitũ nake, nakĩo kĩarĩ kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa muoyo na gĩa thayũ, na niĩ ngĩmũhe cio; ũndũ ũcio warĩ wa gũtũma eĩndigĩre, nake akĩndĩĩa na agĩtũũra etigĩrĩte rĩĩtwa rĩakwa.
english: I will come near to you to judgment. I will be a swift witness against the sorcerers, against the adulterers, against the perjurers, and against those who oppress the hireling in his wages, the widow, and the fatherless, and who deprive the foreigner of justice, and don’t fear me,” says Yahweh of Armies.

kikuyu: NgaiMwene- Hinya-Wothe arokũrathima na atũme ũciarane mũno na ũingĩhe o nginya ũgaatuĩka rũrĩrĩ rwa andũ aingĩ.
english: May God Almighty bless you, and make you fruitful, and multiply you, that you may be a company of peoples,

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo wendo waku nĩ mũnene harĩ niĩ; nĩũndeithũrĩte kuuma mbĩrĩra-inĩ o kũrĩa kũriku mũno.
english: But to you, Yahweh, I have cried. In the morning, my prayer comes before you.

kikuyu: Kuuma hau agĩthiĩ erekeire irĩma iria irĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa itũũra rĩa Betheli, na akĩamba hema yake, Betheli ĩgĩkorwo ĩrĩ mwena wa ithũĩro na itũũra rĩa Ai rĩrĩ mwena wa irathĩro. Hau nĩho aakĩire Jehova kĩgongona na agĩkaĩra rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova.
english: He left from there to go to the mountain on the east of Bethel and pitched his tent, having Bethel on the west, and Ai on the east. There he built an altar to Yahweh and called on Yahweh’s name.

kikuyu: Ndigiri ĩnyonire, yanjeherera maita macio matatũ. Korwo ndĩnanjeherera, hatirĩ nganja nĩingĩgũkũũragĩte, no yo nĩingĩamĩhonokia.”
english: The donkey saw me, and turned away before me these three times. Unless she had turned away from me, surely now I would have killed you, and saved her alive.”

kikuyu: Marigĩrĩrio- inĩ andũ acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ tũkoona ũndũ tũngĩcuukĩra Danieli, tiga ũkorirwo nĩ ũndũ ũkoniĩ watho wa Ngai wake.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio atongoria na anene a bũrũri magĩthiĩ marĩ gĩkundi kũrĩ mũthamaki, makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ: “Wee Mũthamaki Dario, ũrotũũra nginya tene!
english: Then these men said, “We won’t find any occasion against this Daniel, unless we find it against him concerning the law of his God.”

kikuyu: O akĩaragia-rĩ, mũkinyia-ũhoro o ũngĩ agĩũka, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ariũ na aarĩ aku mekũrĩĩaga, makĩnyuuaga ndibei kwa mũrũ wa nyina wao ũrĩa mũkũrũ;
english: While he was still speaking, there came also another, and said, “Your sons and your daughters were eating and drinking wine in their oldest brother’s house,

kikuyu: Ahaana ta mũtĩ ũitĩrĩirio maaĩ wega ũrĩ riũa-inĩ, ũtambũrũkĩtie thuuna ciaguo mũgũnda-inĩ;
english: If I had called, and he had answered me, yet I wouldn’t believe that he listened to my voice.

kikuyu: Nĩmathĩnĩkĩte nĩ ũndũ wa wagi na ngʼaragu, ũtukũ-rĩ, moorũũraga bũrũri mũngʼaru, bũrũri mwanangĩku ũkirĩte ihooru.
english: They are gaunt from lack and famine. They gnaw the dry ground, in the gloom of waste and desolation.

kikuyu: ũrĩ ũtheri wa kũguũrĩria andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ, o na riiri kũrĩ andũ aku a Isiraeli.” Nake ithe na nyina makĩgega mũno nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa maaririo igũrũ rĩako.
english: He will be great and will be called the Son of the Most High. The Lord God will give him the throne of his father David,

kikuyu: Andũ amwe matariĩ ta mbeũ iria ciagũire njĩra-inĩ harĩa ũhoro ũhuragwo. Acio nĩ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro, na maarĩkia kũigua-rĩ, Shaitani agooka akeheria ũhoro ũcio wahaandwo thĩinĩ wao.
english: They came to Jesus, and saw him who had been possessed by demons sitting, clothed, and in his right mind, even him who had the legion; and they were afraid.

kikuyu: niĩ no ndĩrĩkenagĩra Jehova, njanjamũkage nĩ ũndũ wa Ngai Mũhonokia wakwa.
english: yet I will rejoice in Yahweh. I will be joyful in the God of my salvation!

kikuyu: Jesũ akĩmeera, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtigĩte mũciĩ wake, kana mũtumia wake, kana ariũ a nyina, kana aciari ake, o na kana ciana ciake, nĩ ũndũ wa ũthamaki wa Ngai,
english: He said to them, “Most certainly I tell you, there is no one who has left house, or wife, or brothers, or parents, or children, for God’s Kingdom’s sake,

kikuyu: Makĩria ma ũguo-rĩ, maũndũ mothe ndĩmatuaga nĩ ma tũhũ ndamagerekania na ũmenyo ũrĩa ũkĩrĩte maũndũ mothe ũrĩa uumanĩte na kũmenya Kristũ Jesũ Mwathani wakwa. Nĩ ũndũ wake-rĩ, niĩ ndoorirwo nĩ indo ciothe, na niĩ ngĩcitua o ta mahuti ma gũteo, nĩgeetha ndĩgĩĩre na Kristũ,
english: And being found in human form, he humbled himself, becoming obedient to the point of death, yes, the death of the cross.

kikuyu: Njĩra ya kĩgũũta nĩkũhingwo ĩhingĩtwo na mĩigua, no njĩra ya mũndũ mũrũngĩrĩru nĩ njĩra njariĩ.
english: The way of the sluggard is like a thorn patch, but the path of the upright is a highway.

kikuyu: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Harĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora rwa gũũkĩrĩra andũ a Babuloni, rũũkĩrĩre arĩa matũũraga Babuloni, na rũũkĩrĩre anene na andũ arĩa ogĩ akuo!
english: “A sword is on the Chaldeans,” says Yahweh, “and on the inhabitants of Babylon, on her princes, and on her wise men.

kikuyu: Kũrigania nake, Malikija, ũmwe wa aturi a thahabu, agĩcookereria rũthingo nginya nyũmba-inĩ ya ndungata cia hekarũ na cia onjorithia, kũngʼethera Kĩhingo gĩa Gũtuĩria, na o nginya kanyũmba karĩa kaarĩ igũrũ rĩa koine;
english: After him, Malchijah, one of the goldsmiths to the house of the temple servants, and of the merchants, made repairs opposite the gate of Hammiphkad and to the ascent of the corner.

kikuyu: akĩngururia kuuma gacĩra-inĩ, akĩndambuura, akĩndiganĩria itarĩ na ũteithio.
english: Yahweh has accomplished his wrath. He has poured out his fierce anger. He has kindled a fire in Zion, which has devoured its foundations.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩmũnyiita, makĩmũruta hau makĩmũtwara kwa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene, nake Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra arĩ o haraaya. Nao maarĩkia gwakia mwaki o nja gatagatĩ na gũikara thĩ hamwe, Petero nake agĩikara thĩ hamwe nao.
english: They seized him and led him away, and brought him into the high priest’s house. But Peter followed from a distance.

kikuyu: Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo, arutwo ake aingĩ makĩhũndũka, na matiacookire kũmũrũmĩrĩra.
english: At this, many of his disciples went back and walked no more with him.

kikuyu: Nĩwamakirĩrĩirie mĩaka mĩingĩ. Na ũndũ wa Roho waku, nĩwamakaanagia na tũnua twa anabii aku. No matiigana gũkũigua, na nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũkĩmaneana moko-inĩ ma ndũrĩrĩ iria maariganĩtie nacio. No tondũ wa tha ciaku nyingĩ, ndwamaniinire kana ũkĩmatiganĩria, nĩgũkorwo ũrĩ Mũrungu mũtugi na mũigua tha.
english: Yet many years you put up with them, and testified against them by your Spirit through your prophets. Yet they would not listen. Therefore you gave them into the hand of the peoples of the lands.

kikuyu: Ngĩĩcũũrania maũndũ macio, na ngĩrũithia andũ arĩa maarĩ igweta na anene, ngĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũreetia andũ a bũrũri wanyu uumithio wa mbeeca iria mũmakombithĩtie!” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩĩtana mũcemanio mũnene wa kũmaciirithia,
english: But when Sanballat, Tobiah, the Arabians, the Ammonites, and the Ashdodites heard that the repairing of the walls of Jerusalem went forward, and that the breaches began to be filled, they were very angry;

kikuyu: Nĩngaiga gĩtĩ gĩakwa kĩa ũnene kũu Elamu, na niine mũthamaki wakuo o na anene akuo,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: I will set my throne in Elam, and will destroy from there king and princes,’ says Yahweh.

kikuyu: o na ningĩ matukũ-inĩ ma wathani wa Jehoiakimu mũrũ wa Josia, mũthamaki wa Juda, o nginya mweri wa gatano, mwaka-inĩ wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa wathani wa Zedekia mũrũ wa Josia, mũthamaki wa Juda, rĩrĩa andũ a Jerusalemu maatahirwo. Gwĩtwo kwa Jeremia
english: Israel was holiness to Yahweh, the first fruits of his increase. All who devour him will be held guilty.  “Yahweh” is God’s proper Name, sometimes rendered “LORD” (all caps) in other translations.  The word translated “Lord” is “Adonai.”  “Behold”, from “הִ ͏נֵּה”, means look at, take notice, observe, see, or gaze at. It is often used as an interjection.

kikuyu: Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ ona Baba, tiga o ũrĩa uumĩte kũrĩ Ngai; we wiki nowe wonete Baba.
english: Not that anyone has seen the Father, except he who is from God. He has seen the Father.

kikuyu: Nĩmekire ũndũ ũcio, makĩnengera Baranaba na Saũlũ iheo ciao matwarĩre athuuri a kanitha.
english: Cornelius said, “Four days ago, I was fasting until this hour; and at the ninth hour,† I prayed in my house, and behold, a man stood before me in bright clothing

kikuyu: “Harũni nĩagacooka atoonye Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwoarute nguo icio cia gatani iria eekĩrire mbere ya gũtoonya Handũ-harĩa-Hatheru-Mũno, nake acitige kuo.
english: “Aaron shall come into the Tent of Meeting, and shall take off the linen garments which he put on when he went into the Holy Place, and shall leave them there.

kikuyu: “Ũrĩa wothe ũtaaraga mũnyũrũrania eĩtagĩria irumi; na ũrĩa wothe ũkaanagia mũndũ mwaganu egĩĩragĩra njono.
english: For my mouth speaks truth. Wickedness is an abomination to my lips.

kikuyu: Mwarĩ wa nyũkwa ũrĩa mũkũrũ aarĩ Samaria ũrĩa watũũraga mwena waku wa gathigathini marĩ na airĩtu ake; nake mwarĩ wa nyũkwa ũrĩa mũnini aarĩ Sodomu, ũrĩa watũũragamwena waku wa gũthini hamwena airĩtu ake.
english: Your elder sister is Samaria, who dwells at your left hand, she and her daughters; and your younger sister, who dwells at your right hand, is Sodom with her daughters.

kikuyu: Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩtũmaga aini a marebeta moige atĩrĩ: “Ũkaai Heshiboni nĩgeetha rĩakwo rĩngĩ; itũũra inene rĩa Sihoni nĩrĩcokererio.
english: Therefore those who speak in proverbs say, “Come to Heshbon. Let the city of Sihon be built and established;

kikuyu: “Agĩcooka akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai wa maithe maitũ nĩagũthuurĩte nĩguo ũmenye wendi wake na wone Ũrĩa Mũthingu, o na ũigue ciugo kuuma kanua gake.
english: They came to the chief priests and the elders, and said, “We have bound ourselves under a great curse to taste nothing until we have killed Paul.

kikuyu: “Ngũrutĩire wĩra mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ. Ngʼondu ciaku na mbũri ciaku itirĩ ciahuna, na ndirĩ ndarĩa ndũrũme cia mahiũ maku. Ningĩ ndirĩ ndakũrehera iria ciatambuuragwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka; no nĩ niĩ ndaarĩhaga ngathiĩ hathara. Ningĩ-rĩ, nĩwandĩhagia ĩrĩa yothe yaiywo kũrĩ mũthenya kana kũrĩ ũtukũ.
english: “These twenty years I have been with you. Your ewes and your female goats have not cast their young, and I haven’t eaten the rams of your flocks.

kikuyu: ũgĩthiĩ mbaara-inĩ nĩũbatarĩtio nĩgũtaarwo,
english: for by wise guidance you wage your war, and victory is in many advisors.

kikuyu: Agĩcooka akĩmeera othe atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ o wothe ũngĩenda kũnũmĩrĩra, no nginya eerege we mwene, na oyage mũtharaba wake o mũthenya, aanũmagĩrĩre.
english: He said to all, “If anyone desires to come after me, let him deny himself, take up his cross,§ and follow me.

kikuyu: Wee waheire hinya wa kũrũa mbaara; ũgĩgĩtũma thũ ciakwa ciinamĩrĩre magũrũ-inĩ makwa.
english: For you have armed me with strength to the battle. You have subdued under me those who rose up against me.

kikuyu: Wee Ngai, ndũrĩrĩ nĩitharĩkĩire igai rĩaku; nĩithaahĩtie hekarũ yaku theru, imomorete itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩgatuĩka irũndo cia mahiga.
english: Hear us, Shepherd of Israel, you who lead Joseph like a flock, you who sit above the cherubim, shine out.

kikuyu: Tũngĩikio icua- inĩ rĩa mwaki ũgwakana mũno-rĩ, Ngai ũrĩa ithuĩ tũtungataga e na ũhoti wa gũtũruta thĩinĩ warĩo, na nĩwe ũgũtũhonokia kuuma guoko-inĩ gwaku, wee mũthamaki. No rĩrĩ, o na angĩaga gũtũhonokia-rĩ, nĩtũkwenda ũmenye, wee mũthamaki, atĩ ithuĩ tũtingĩtungatĩra ngai ciaku, kana tũhooe mũhianano wa thahabu ũcio wee ũhandithĩtie.”
english: For your all-powerful hand that created the world out of formless matter didn’t lack means to send upon them a multitude of bears, fierce lions,

kikuyu: Ndũkanaciirĩre gwĩka mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku ũũru,
english: Don’t devise evil against your neighbor, since he dwells securely by you.

kikuyu: Aatũkũũrire nĩguo kĩrathimo kĩrĩa Iburahĩmu aarathimĩtwo nakĩo gĩkinyĩre andũ-a- Ndũrĩrĩ na ũndũ wa Kristũ Jesũ, nĩguo atĩ na ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia twamũkĩre Roho ũrĩa weranĩirwo. Watho na Kĩĩranĩro
english: that the blessing of Abraham might come on the Gentiles through Christ Jesus, that we might receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.

kikuyu: Nyamũ ĩyo wonire yarĩ ho, na rĩu ndĩrĩ ho, na ĩrĩ hakuhĩ kuuma Irima-rĩrĩa-Rĩtarĩ- Gĩturi ĩthiĩ ĩkaanangwo. Nao andũ arĩa matũũraga thĩ, arĩa marĩĩtwa mao mataandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa muoyo kuuma rĩrĩa thĩ yombirwo nĩmakagega mona nyamũ ĩyo, tondũ hĩndĩ ĩmwe yarĩ ho, na rĩu ndĩrĩ ho, no nĩĩrĩũka.
english: Therefore in one day her plagues will come: death, mourning, and famine; and she will be utterly burned with fire, for the Lord God who has judged her is strong.

kikuyu: Rĩrĩ nĩ riita rĩa gatatũ gũũka kwanyu. Ũhoro o wothe no nginya ũrũgamĩrĩrwo nĩ ũira wa andũ eerĩ kana atatũ.
english: Esdras and the Prayer of Manasseh are also in an appendix to the Latin Vulgate Bible. The Slavonic Bible includes

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire tũkĩhaica marikabu, tũgĩthiĩ tũgĩkinya harĩa haaringaine na Kio, na thuutha wa mũthenya ũcio tũgĩkinya Samo, naguo mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ warũmĩrĩire, tũgĩkinya Mileto.
english: Sailing from there, we came the following day opposite Chios. The next day we touched at Samos and stayed at Trogyllium, and the day after we came to Miletus.

kikuyu: Nĩarĩirwo ũrĩrĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka arĩa maanakua, kĩrĩndĩ gĩake kĩrigiicĩirie mbĩrĩra yake. Acio othe ti aruu, na mooragirwo na rũhiũ rwa njora. Tondũ nĩo maaguoyohithanagia bũrũri wa arĩa marĩ muoyo, maikaraga maconokete marĩ hamwe na arĩa maharũrũkĩtio irima; magakomio hamwe na arĩa maanooragwo.
english: They have made Elam a bed among the slain with all her multitude. Her graves are around her, all of them uncircumcised, slain by the sword; for their terror was caused in the land of the living, and they have borne their shame with those who go down to the pit. He is put among those who are slain.

kikuyu: Juda, we ũrĩ kĩana kĩa mũrũũthi, mũrũ wakwa; we ũcookaga kuuma ũguĩmi-inĩ ũhũũnĩte ũguĩmi waku. O ta mũrũũthi-rĩ, ethunaga na agakoma thĩ, o ta mũrũũthi wa mũgoma-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩthĩgĩrĩria kũmwarahũra?
english: Judah is a lion’s cub. From the prey, my son, you have gone up. He stooped down, he crouched as a lion, as a lioness. Who will rouse him up?

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo ciugo ciaku nĩcio igaatũma ũtuuo ndũrĩ na mahĩtia, na ciugo ciaku no cio igaatũma ũtuuo mũhĩtia.” Kĩama kĩa Jona
english: For by your words you will be justified, and by your words you will be condemned.”

kikuyu: Mũndũ wa mĩthiĩre mĩrũngĩrĩru athiiaga ategwĩtigĩra ũgwati, no mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ mĩthiĩre mĩogomu nĩakamenyeka.
english: With his mouth the godless man destroys his neighbor, but the righteous will be delivered through knowledge.

kikuyu: Maaĩ makaiyũra ndoo ciao nginya maitĩke; o nayo mbegũ yao ĩgakorwo na maaĩ maingĩ. “Mũthamaki wao akaaneneha gũkĩra Agagi; ũthamaki wao nĩũgaatũgĩrio.
english: Water shall flow from his buckets. His seed shall be in many waters. His king shall be higher than Agag. His kingdom shall be exalted.

kikuyu: ngoro ciao itiarĩ njĩhokeku kũrĩ we, na matiarĩ eehokeku harĩ kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake.
english: For their heart was not right with him, neither were they faithful in his covenant.

kikuyu: Kĩrĩa kĩnini warĩ nakĩo itaanoka nĩkĩingĩhĩte mũno, nake Jehova nĩakũrathimĩte kũrĩa guothe ngoretwo. No rĩrĩ, ngeekĩra nyũmba yakwa ũndũ rĩ?”
english: For it was little which you had before I came, and it has increased to a multitude. Yahweh has blessed you wherever I turned. Now when will I provide for my own house also?”

kikuyu: “Andũ ethĩ o na arĩa akũrũ makomete hamwe rũkũngũ-inĩ rwa njĩra, aanake akwa na airĩtu moragĩtwo na rũhiũ rwa njora. Ũmoragĩte mũthenya ũrĩa ũrakarĩte; ũmoragĩte ũtekũmaiguĩra tha.
english: “The youth and the old man lie on the ground in the streets. My virgins and my young men have fallen by the sword. You have killed them in the day of your anger. You have slaughtered, and not pitied.

kikuyu: Ũthamaki waku nĩ ũthamaki wa gũtũũra tene na tene, naguo wathani waku ũtũũraga nginya njiarwa ciothe. Jehova nĩ mwĩhokeku harĩ ciĩranĩro ciake ciothe, na nĩendete kĩrĩa gĩothe ombĩte.
english: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom. Your dominion endures throughout all generations. Yahweh is faithful in all his words, and loving in all his deeds.‡

kikuyu: Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio ehumbĩte nguo cia rangi wa ndathi na mũtune, na akegemia na thahabu, na tũhiga twa goro, o na ruru. Guoko-inĩ gwake nĩanyiitĩte gĩkombe gĩa thahabu kĩiyũrĩtio maũndũ marĩ magigi, na ciĩko cia ũtharia wake.
english: The woman was dressed in purple and scarlet, and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls, having in her hand a golden cup full of abominations and the impurities of the sexual immorality of the earth.

kikuyu: “Mwakĩhota atĩa kuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Ithuĩ tũrĩ njamba irĩ hinya, andũ marĩ ũrũme ita-inĩ’?
english: I have heard news from Yahweh, and an ambassador is sent among the nations, saying, “Gather yourselves together! Come against her! Rise up to the battle!”

kikuyu: “Ta thikĩrĩria mohoro ma kĩrĩkanĩro gĩkĩ, ũcooke ũhe andũ a Juda o na andũ arĩa matũũraga Jerusalemu ũhoro wamo.
english: “Hear the words of this covenant, and speak to the men of Judah, and to the inhabitants of Jerusalem;

kikuyu: Gideoni akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “No rĩrĩ, Mwathani, ingĩkĩhota atĩa kũhonokia Isiraeli? Mũhĩrĩga witũ nĩguo ũtarĩ hinya thĩinĩ wa Manase, na ningĩ nĩ niĩ mũnini mũno nyũmba-inĩ iitũ.”
english: It was so, when Gideon heard the telling of the dream and its interpretation, that he worshiped. Then he returned into the camp of Israel and said, “Arise, for Yahweh has delivered the army of Midian into your hand!”

kikuyu: Matikabatario nĩkũngania ngũ werũ-inĩ kana maciune mĩtitũ, tondũ nĩmagakagia mwaki kuuma indo-inĩ icio cia mbaara. Nao nĩmagataha arĩa maamatahĩte na matunye arĩa maamatunyĩte indo, ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga.
english: The side rooms of the gate eastward were three on this side, and three on that side. The three of them were of one measure. The posts had one measure on this side and on that side.

kikuyu: Ici nĩcio ciarĩ njiaro cia Shuthela; kuuma kũrĩ Erani, nĩ mbarĩ ya Aerani.
english: These are the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, the family of the Eranites.

kikuyu: Kena na ũcanjamũke, wee Mwarĩ wa Edomu, o wee ũtũũraga bũrũri wa Uzu. No rĩrĩ, o nawe gĩkombe gĩkĩ nĩgĩgagũkora; ũgaakĩnyuĩra ũrĩĩo, na ũrutwo nguo, ũtigwo njaga.
english: Rejoice and be glad, daughter of Edom, who dwells in the land of Uz. The cup will pass through to you also. You will be drunken, and will make yourself naked.

kikuyu: Esaũ akĩũria ithe atĩrĩ, “Baba, ndũrĩ na kĩrathimo o na kĩmwe ũndigĩirie? Ndaathima o na niĩ, baba!” Na hĩndĩ ĩyo Esaũ akĩrĩra anĩrĩire. Nake ithe Isaaka akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Wee ũgaatũũraga kũraihu na ũnoru wa thĩ, kũraihu na ime rĩrĩa riumaga igũrũ.†
english: Esau said to his father, “Do you have just one blessing, my father? Bless me, even me also, my father.” Esau lifted up his voice, and wept.

kikuyu: O ihinda rĩu rĩa ũtukũ, mũrangĩri ũcio wa njeera akĩmooya, akĩmathambia ironda, na o hĩndĩ ĩyo we na andũ othe a nyũmba yake makĩbatithio.
english: He took them the same hour of the night and washed their stripes, and was immediately baptized, he and all his household.

kikuyu: O na rĩu mũgethi nĩagĩĩaga na mũcaara wake, o na nĩagethaga magetha ma muoyo wa tene na tene, nĩgeetha mũhaandi na mũgethi makenanĩre hamwe.
english: He who reaps receives wages and gathers fruit to eternal life, that both he who sows and he who reaps may rejoice together.

kikuyu: “Thuutha wa ihinda iraaya, mwathi wa ndungata icio nĩacookire na agĩciĩta nĩguo iheane ũhoro wa mathabu ma mbeeca ciake.
english: The disciples did as Jesus commanded them, and they prepared the Passover.

kikuyu: Magarũrĩra ma Mũthia ma Nehemia Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya ũcio, Ibuku rĩa Musa rĩgĩthomwo na mũgambo mũnene andũ makĩĩiguagĩra, rĩgĩthomwo handũ haandĩkĩtwo atĩ gũtirĩ Mũamoni kana Mũmoabi ũgetĩkĩrio akorwo kĩũngano-inĩ kĩa andũ a Ngai, 2tondũ matiigana kũhe andũ a Isiraeli irio na maaĩ; no-o nĩ kũrĩha maarĩhire Balamu amarume. (No rĩrĩ, Ngai witũ akĩgarũra kĩrumi gĩgĩtuĩka kĩrathimo.) Rĩrĩa andũ maaiguire watho ũcio, makĩeheria andũ othe arĩa maarĩ ageni kuuma Isiraeli.
english: 1 On that day they read in the book of Moses in the hearing of the people; and it was found written in it that an Ammonite and a Moabite should not enter into the assembly of God forever,

kikuyu: “Tiga kũhoera andũ aya, kana ũmathaithanĩrĩre, o na kana ũmaarĩrĩrie, tondũ ndikamathikĩrĩria hĩndĩ ĩrĩa makaangaĩra marĩ mĩnyamaro-inĩ.
english: Every man has become brutish and without knowledge. Every goldsmith is disappointed by his engraved image; for his molten image is falsehood, and there is no breath in them.

kikuyu: Mĩguĩ yao nĩ mĩũgĩ, namo mota mao mothe nĩmageete; mahũngũ ma mbarathi ciao mahaana ta ihiga rĩa nyaigĩ, namo magũrũ ma ngaari ciao cia ita mathiiaga ta rũhuho.
english: whose arrows are sharp, and all their bows bent. Their horses’ hoofs will be like flint, and their wheels like a whirlwind.

kikuyu: “Nĩ kũrĩ andũ arĩa mareganaga na ũtheri, na matiũĩ njĩra ciaguo, o na kana magaikara tũcĩra-inĩ twaguo.
english: “These are of those who rebel against the light. They don’t know its ways, nor stay in its paths.

kikuyu: Kaĩ arĩa marokaga gũũkĩra rũciinĩ tene, makahangʼĩre njoohi marĩ na haaro-ĩ! o acio maikaraga thĩ ũtukũ gũgakũra, nginya makarĩĩo nĩ ndibei.
english: Then I said, “Lord, how long?” He answered, “Until cities are waste without inhabitant, houses without man, the land becomes utterly waste,

kikuyu: Ngoretwo nĩ mathĩĩna na mĩnyamaro, no maathani maku nĩmo ngenagĩra.
english: Trouble and anguish have taken hold of me. Your commandments are my delight.

kikuyu: “Atarothu, na Diboni, na Jazeri, na Nimura, na Heshiboni, na Eleale, na Sebamu, na Nebo, o na Beoni,
english: “Ataroth, Dibon, Jazer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Sebam, Nebo, and Beon,

kikuyu: Gĩkuũ kĩambatĩte gĩgaatoonyera ndirica-inĩ ciitũ, na gĩgatoonya nyũmba ciitũ iria ciirigĩirwo na hinya, nĩkĩniinĩte ciana ciitũ kũu barabara-inĩ cia itũũra, o na aanake aitũ makaniinwo kuuma kũu ihaaro-inĩ.
english: that again when I come my God would humble me before you, and I would mourn for many of those who have sinned before now, and not repented of the uncleanness, sexual immorality, and lustfulness which they committed.

kikuyu: Athuuri a kĩrĩndĩ kĩu nĩmakaigĩrĩra moko mao igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wa ndegwa ĩyo mbere ya Jehova, nayo ndegwa ĩyo ĩthĩnjĩrwo o ro hau mbere ya Jehova. Ningĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio mũitĩrĩrie maguta nĩakoya thakame ĩmwe ya ndegwa ĩyo amĩtoonyie thĩinĩ wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo.
english: The elders of the congregation shall lay their hands on the head of the bull before Yahweh; and the bull shall be killed before Yahweh.

kikuyu: Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩgaakorwo rĩrĩ iherithia rĩa bũrũri wa Misiri, o na rĩa ndũrĩrĩ ciothe iria itaambataga igathiĩ gũkũngũĩra Gĩathĩ kĩu gĩa Ithũnũ.
english: This will be the punishment of Egypt and the punishment of all the nations that don’t go up to keep the feast of booths.

kikuyu: Mũigana wa arũme acio othe a Isiraeli maarĩ andũ 601,730.
english: These are those who were counted of the children of Israel, six hundred one thousand seven hundred thirty.

kikuyu: Timotheo Kũnyiitana na Paũlũ na Sila Na rĩrĩ, Paũlũ agĩkinya Deribe agĩcooka akiuma kuo agĩthiĩ Lisitera, kũrĩa mũrutwo wetagwo Timotheo aatũũraga, ũrĩa nyina aarĩ Mũyahudi mũtumia wetĩkĩtie Ngai, no ithe aarĩ Mũyunani.
english: 1 He came to Derbe and Lystra; and behold, a certain disciple was there, named Timothy, the son of a Jewess who believed, but his father was a Greek.

kikuyu: Maigua ũguo makĩgeria kũmũnyiita, no gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wamũhutirie, tondũ ihinda rĩake rĩtiarĩ ikinyu.
english: As he spoke these things, many believed in him.

kikuyu: na guoko kwa hinya na atambũrũkĩtie gĩcoka gĩake, Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
english: with a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm, for his loving kindness endures forever;

kikuyu: Ambarariai moko manyu mũrĩ thĩinĩ wa handũ-harĩa-haamũre mũgooce Jehova.
english: you who stand in Yahweh’s house, in the courts of our God’s house.

kikuyu: Ũrĩa ũtanyendete ndathĩkagĩra ũrutani wakwa. Ciugo icio mũiguaga ti ciakwa niĩ mwene; nĩ cia Baba ũrĩa wandũmire.
english: If I hadn’t done among them the works which no one else did, they wouldn’t have had sin. But now they have seen and also hated both me and my Father.

kikuyu: Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Simoni, ndĩ na ũndũ wa gũkwĩra.” Nake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, njĩĩra.”
english: Jesus answered him, “Simon, I have something to tell you.” He said, “Teacher, say on.”

kikuyu: “Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi, githĩ ndarĩ na mina ikũmi!’
english: “They said to him, ‘Lord, he has ten minas!’

kikuyu: Ta thikĩrĩriai inyuĩ andũ aya akĩĩgu na mũtarĩ mbuguĩro, o inyuĩ mũrĩ na maitho na mũtionaga, na mũrĩ na matũ na mũtiiguaga:
english: ‘Hear this now, foolish people without understanding, who have eyes, and don’t see, who have ears, and don’t hear:

kikuyu: Hau-rĩ, mũndũ mũrũngĩrĩru no atware ciira wake mbere yake, na niĩ njohorithio kuuma kũrĩ mũnjiirithia nginya tene.
english: There the upright might reason with him, so I should be delivered forever from my judge.

kikuyu: Maatoonyire bũrũri ũcio makĩwĩgwatĩra ũgĩtuĩka wao, no rĩrĩ, matiigana gũgwathĩkĩra kana kũrũmĩrĩra mawatho maku; matiekire maũndũ marĩa wamaathĩte meke. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũkĩmarehithĩria mwanangĩko ũyũ ũmakorete.
english: Yahweh of Armies, the God of Israel, says: “Yet again they will use this speech in the land of Judah and in its cities, when I reverse their captivity: ‘Yahweh bless you, habitation of righteousness, mountain of holiness.’

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo Anania agĩthiĩ na agĩtoonya nyũmba ĩyo. Akĩigĩrĩra Saũlũ moko, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Saũlũ, mũrũ wa Ithe witũ, Mwathani, o we Jesũ ũrĩa ũrakuumĩrĩire ũrĩ njĩra-inĩ ũgĩũka gũkũ, nĩandũmĩte nĩguo ũcooke kuona, na ũiyũrio na Roho Mũtheru.”
english: Ananias departed and entered into the house. Laying his hands on him, he said, “Brother Saul, the Lord, who appeared to you on the road by which you came, has sent me that you may receive your sight and be filled with the Holy Spirit.”

kikuyu: Angĩkorwo iruta rĩanyu rĩa mũtu nĩ mũgate ũkarangĩirwo igũrũ wa rũgĩo-rĩ, no nginya ũthondekwo na mũtu ũrĩa mũhinyu mũno ũtukanĩtio na maguta, na ũtarĩ na ndawa ya kũimbia.
english: Aaron’s sons shall burn it on the altar on the burnt offering, which is on the wood that is on the fire: it is an offering made by fire, of a pleasant aroma to Yahweh.

kikuyu: Warerire kĩana kĩmwe kĩaguo, gĩgĩtuĩka mũrũũthi ũrĩ hinya. Mũrũũthi ũcio ũkĩmenyera gũtambuuranga kĩrĩa wanyiita, na ũkarĩĩaga andũ.
english: She brought up one of her cubs. He became a young lion. He learned to catch the prey. He devoured men.

kikuyu: na Amamu, na Shema, na Molada,
english: Amam, Shema, Moladah,

kikuyu: Nĩngerĩhĩria ndĩ na marakara na mangʼũrĩ kũrĩ ndũrĩrĩ iria itanjathĩkagĩra.”
english: I will execute vengeance in anger and wrath on the nations that didn’t listen.”

kikuyu: Nĩnjiguĩte atĩ ũrĩ na roho wa ngai iria theru thĩinĩ waku na atĩ ũrĩ na ũtaũku, na ũhoti wa gwĩciiria na ũũgĩ wa mwanya.
english: Then the king, when he heard these words, was very displeased, and set his heart on Daniel to deliver him; and he labored until the going down of the sun to rescue him.

kikuyu: Ngaari cia ita iraguthũka ituĩkanĩirie njĩra cia itũũra, irahanyũka na mbere, ningĩ na thuutha, ituĩkanĩirie ihaaro-inĩ cia itũũra. Ihaana ta imũrĩ irakana; irahiũka ta rũheni.
english: The chariots rage in the streets. They rush back and forth in the wide ways. Their appearance is like torches. They run like the lightnings.

kikuyu: ngakũruta ciugo cia ma na cia kwĩhokeka, nĩgeetha ũkaahota kũhe ũrĩa ũgũtũmĩte macookio mega?
english: To teach you truth, reliable words, to give sound answers to the ones who sent you?

kikuyu: “ ‘Juda na Isiraeli nĩmoonjorithanagia nawe; magĩkũũrania indo ciaku cia wonjoria na ngano ya kuuma Minithu, na theremende, na ũũkĩ, na maguta, na ũbani.
english: “ ‘ “Judah and the land of Israel were your traders. They traded wheat of Minnith, confections, honey, oil, and balm for your merchandise.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe oigĩte atĩrĩ ngĩiguaga: “Ti-itherũ nyũmba iria nene nĩigakira ihooru, nacio nyũmba iria thaka ciage andũ a gũciikara.
english: He said, “Go, and tell this people, ‘You hear indeed, but don’t understand. You see indeed, but don’t perceive.’

kikuyu: Ũyũ nĩwe ũhoro wake waandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “ ‘Nĩngũtũma mũtũmwo wakwa athiĩ mbere yaku, agagũthondekere njĩra yaku.’
english: For this is he, of whom it is written, ‘Behold, I send my messenger before your face, who will prepare your way before you.’*

kikuyu: Tigaga kũrakara na wĩrigagĩrĩrie mangʼũrĩ; tigaga gũthĩĩnĩka ngoro, tondũ ũndũ ũcio no ũtũme wĩke ũũru.
english: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath. Don’t fret; it leads only to evildoing.

kikuyu: “Jehova akaamba kũhonokia andũ arĩa matũũraga Juda, nĩgeetha gĩtĩĩo kĩa nyũmba ya Daudi na kĩa aikari a Jerusalemu gĩtikananenehe gũkĩra kĩa andũ a Juda.
english: Yahweh also will save the tents of Judah first, that the glory of David’s house and the glory of the inhabitants of Jerusalem not be magnified above Judah.

kikuyu: Ũtũire wĩhokete waganu waku, ũkoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũnyonaga.’ Ũũgĩ na ũmenyo waku nĩikũhĩtithagia rĩrĩa ũkwĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Niĩ no niĩ, na gũtirĩ ũngĩ tiga niĩ.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwanangĩko nĩũgagũkora, na ndũkaamenya ũrĩa ũngĩũũrĩra. Nĩũgakorererwo nĩ mũtino ũrĩa ũtangĩhota gwĩkũũra kuuma kũrĩ guo; ningĩ nĩũgakorererwo o ro rĩmwe nĩ ihooru rĩa maũndũ ũterĩgĩrĩire.
english: For you have trusted in your wickedness. You have said, ‘No one sees me.’ Your wisdom and your knowledge has perverted you. You have said in your heart, ‘I am, and there is no one else besides me.’

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo andũ acio othe-rĩ, nduma ĩrĩa ndumanu nĩyo rũciinĩ rwao; magĩaga ũrata na imakania cia nduma.
english: For the morning is to all of them like thick darkness, for they know the terrors of the thick darkness.

kikuyu: Nĩngagũikia kũu bũrũri-inĩ, ngũnyugute werũ-inĩ ũtarĩ kĩndũ. Nĩngatũma nyoni ciothe cia rĩera-inĩ ikũũmbĩrĩre, nacio nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka ciĩhũũnĩrĩrie nawe.
english: then whoever hears the sound of the trumpet and doesn’t heed the warning, if the sword comes and takes him away, his blood will be on his own head.

kikuyu: Mũgambo ũkiuma itu-inĩ rĩu, ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩwe Mũrũ wakwa, ũrĩa ndĩĩthuurĩire; mũiguagei.”
english: A voice came out of the cloud, saying, “This is my beloved Son. Listen to him!”

kikuyu: Magatũũra maciaraga maciaro o na marĩ akũrũ, matũũre marĩ na hinya wa wĩthĩ wao, na marĩ aruru,
english: For Yahweh won’t reject his people, neither will he forsake his inheritance.

kikuyu: atĩ nĩagatũhonokia kuuma guoko-inĩ gwa thũ ciitũ, na atũhotithie kũmũtungatagĩra tũtarĩ na guoya,
english: to grant to us that we, being delivered out of the hand of our enemies, should serve him without fear,

kikuyu: “Aca! Ithuĩ twekire ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra atĩ mũthenya ũmwe njiaro cianyu ciahota gũkeera ciitũ atĩrĩ, ‘Inyuĩ nĩ ũhoro ũrĩkũ mũrĩ naguo na Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli?
english: “If we have not out of concern done this, and for a reason, saying, ‘In time to come your children might speak to our children, saying, “What have you to do with Yahweh, the God of Israel?

kikuyu: “ ‘Ndũkanakome na nyamũ nawe wĩthaahie nayo. Mũndũ-wa-nja ndakanetware harĩ nyamũ akome nayo; gwĩka ũguo nĩ waganu mũkĩru njano.
english: “ ‘You shall not lie with any animal to defile yourself with it. No woman may give herself to an animal, to lie down with it: it is a perversion.

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũmwe-rĩ, mũirĩtu ũrĩa warĩ mũkũrũ akĩĩra ũrĩa warĩ mũnini atĩrĩ, “Ithe witũ nĩ mũkũrũ, na gũtirĩ mũndũ mũrũme ũrĩ hakuhĩ wa gũkoma na ithuĩ, ta ũrĩa arĩ mũtugo kũndũ guothe gũkũ thĩ.
english: The firstborn said to the younger, “Our father is old, and there is not a man in the earth to come in to us in the way of all the earth.

kikuyu: Kĩhuhũkanio kĩahĩtũka andũ arĩa aaganu maticookaga kuoneka, no andũ arĩa athingu mehaandaga wega nginya tene.
english: When the whirlwind passes, the wicked is no more; but the righteous stand firm forever.

kikuyu: Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo marĩ na nda na arĩa magaakorwo makĩongithia hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmagakorwo marĩ na haaro-ĩ!
english: But woe to those who are with child and to those who nurse babies in those days!

kikuyu: Ũũ nĩguo Ngai oonanirie wendo wake harĩ ithuĩ: Nĩatũmire Mũriũ wake, o we wa mũmwe, gũkũ thĩ nĩgeetha tũtũũre muoyo nĩ ũndũ wake.
english: By this God’s love was revealed in us, that God has sent his only born† Son into the world that we might live through him.

kikuyu: Mbarĩ cia Amerari: ciarĩ Mahali na Mushi. Ici nĩcio ciarĩ mbarĩ cia Alawii, kũringana na nyũmba ciao.
english: but they shall not go in to see the sanctuary even for a moment, lest they die.”

kikuyu: Judasi ũcio wamũkunyanĩire nĩamaheete kĩmenyithia akameera atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa ndĩmumunya nĩwe; mũmũnyiite na mũmũtware arangĩirwo.”
english: Now he who betrayed him had given them a sign, saying, “Whomever I will kiss, that is he. Seize him, and lead him away safely.”

kikuyu: Mĩario ya mũndũ mũkĩĩgu nĩ rũthanju rwa kũmũhũũra, no mĩromo ya arĩa oogĩ nĩĩmagitagĩra.
english: Yahweh’s eyes are everywhere, keeping watch on the evil and the good.

kikuyu: Arahũka, wee kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto na gĩa kĩnũbi! Ngwarahũka ruoro rũgĩtema.
english: Wake up, harp and lyre! I will wake up the dawn.

kikuyu: no mũngĩrema na mũrege gwathĩka, mũkaaniinwo na rũhiũ rwa njora.” Nĩgũkorwo nĩ kanua ka Jehova koigĩte ũguo.
english: but if you refuse and rebel, you will be devoured with the sword; for Yahweh’s mouth has spoken it.”  “Yahweh” is God’s proper Name, sometimes rendered “LORD” (all caps) in other translations.  or, seed  The Hebrew word rendered “God” is “אֱֹלהִ ֑ים” (Elohim).

kikuyu: Mwaka o mwaka aciari ake nĩmathiiaga Jerusalemu nĩ ũndũ wa Gĩathĩ kĩa Bathaka.‡
english: His parents went every year to Jerusalem at the feast of the Passover.

kikuyu: Ũndũ ũcio nĩwarĩtio handũ hangĩ atĩrĩ: “ ‘Wee ndũkareka ũrĩa waku Mũtheru abuthe.’
english: Therefore he says also in another psalm, ‘You will not allow your Holy One to see decay.’*

kikuyu: Kaĩ mũngĩmuonia kĩmenyano? Kaĩ mũgũciirĩrĩra Mũrungu?
english: Will you show partiality to him? Will you contend for God?

kikuyu: Nĩngamarehithĩria rũhiũ rwa njora, na ngʼaragu, na mũthiro imokĩrĩre, nginya maniinwo mathire bũrũri-inĩ ũrĩa ndaamaheire o na ngĩhe maithe mao.’ ”
english: “For the land is full of adulterers; for because of the curse the land mourns. The pastures of the wilderness have dried up. Their course is evil, and their might is not right;

kikuyu: Thiĩ na andũ aya, ũgwatanĩre nao igongona- inĩ rĩao rĩa gwĩtheria, na ũmarĩhĩre mahũthĩro mao, nĩgeetha menjwo mĩtwe.* Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ othe nĩmekũmenya atĩ ũhoro ũrĩa maiguĩte ũgũkoniĩ ti wa ma, no atĩ wee mwene nĩwathĩkĩire watho.
english: But these things don’t count; nor do I hold my life dear to myself, so that I may finish my race with joy, and the ministry which I received from the Lord Jesus, to fully testify to the Good News of the grace of God.

kikuyu: akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ harĩ kĩroto ndootete kĩrĩa kĩrathĩĩnia, na nĩngwenda kũmenya ũrĩa kiugĩte.”
english: The king spoke to Ashpenaz, the master of his eunuchs, that he should bring in some of the children of Israel, even of the royal offspring§ and of the nobles:
