kikuyu: Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ, Agiripa na Berinike magĩũka marĩ na mwago mũnene na magĩtoonya nyũmba ya gũciirĩrwo marĩ hamwe na anene a thigari o na athuuri a itũũra arĩa maarĩ igweta. Nake Fesito agĩathana Paũlũ areehwo.
english: So on the next day, when Agrippa and Bernice had come with great pomp, and they had entered into the place of hearing with the commanding officers and the principal men of the city, at the command of Festus, Paul was brought in.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo ndaarĩ mũhũũtu mũkĩĩhe gĩa kũrĩa, na ndaarĩ mũnyootu mũkĩĩhe gĩa kũnyua, na ndaarĩ mũgeni mũkĩĩnyiita ũgeni,
english: for I was hungry and you gave me food to eat. I was thirsty and you gave me drink. I was a stranger and you took me in.

kikuyu: Mũhianano wa Thahabu, na Icua rĩa Mwaki Na rĩrĩ, Mũthamaki Nebukadinezaru nĩathondekithirie mũhianano wa thahabu, wa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtandatũ* kũraiha na igũrũ, na mĩkono ĩtandatũ† kwarama, na akĩũhaandithia werũ-inĩ wa Dura kũu bũrũri wa Babuloni.
english: Then the local governors, the deputies, and the governors, the judges, the treasurers, the counselors, the sheriffs, and all the rulers of the provinces were gathered together to the dedication of the image that Nebuchadnezzar the king had set up; and they stood before the image that Nebuchadnezzar had set up.

kikuyu: O ta ũrĩa maaĩ mahehu manyootoraga mũndũ mũnyootu, no taguo ũhoro mwega uumĩte bũrũri wa kũraya wĩkaga.
english: Like cold water to a thirsty soul, so is good news from a far country.

kikuyu: Tiga kũhanyũka nginya ũthirĩrwo nĩ iraatũ magũrũ, naguo mũmero waku ũngʼare. No wee ũkiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Hatirĩ bata! nĩnyendete ngai cia kũngĩ, na no nginya ndĩciume thuutha.’
english: “Keep your feet from being bare, and your throat from thirst. But you said, ‘It is in vain. No, for I have loved strangers, and I will go after them.’

kikuyu: 1 “Ariũ a Baba, o na inyuĩ maithe makwa, thikĩrĩriai ngĩĩyarĩrĩria.” Rĩrĩa maaiguire akĩmaarĩria na rũthiomi rwa Kĩhibirania-rĩ, magĩkira ki. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Paũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ,
english: 1 “Brothers and fathers, listen to the defense which I now make to you.”

kikuyu: “Mũrũ wa mũndũ, arĩria Firaũni mũthamaki wa Misiri na kĩrĩndĩ gĩake, ũmeere atĩrĩ: “ ‘Nũũ ũngĩgerekanio nawe ũhoro-inĩ ũkoniĩ ũnene?
english: “Son of man, tell Pharaoh king of Egypt and his multitude: ‘Whom are you like in your greatness?

kikuyu: Amwe morũũrire werũ-inĩ ũtarĩ kĩndũ, maagĩte njĩra ya kũmakinyia itũũra inene kũrĩa mangĩatũũrire.
english: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way. They found no city to live in.

kikuyu: Ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo watũmire Kristũ akue na acooke ariũke, nĩguo atuĩke Mwathani wa arĩa akuũ na arĩa marĩ muoyo.
english: God is faithful, through whom you were called into the fellowship of his Son, Jesus Christ our Lord.

kikuyu: Andũ aya ti arĩĩu, ta ũrĩa mũreciiria. Rĩu nĩ thaa ithatũ tu cia rũciinĩ!
english: For these aren’t drunken, as you suppose, seeing it is only the third hour of the day.†

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ tũgĩkinya Sidoni; nake Juliasi, nĩ ũndũ wa kũiguĩra Paũlũ tha, akĩmwĩtĩkĩria athiĩ kũrĩ arata aake nĩguo mamũhe kĩrĩa angĩabatarire.
english: The next day, we touched at Sidon. Julius treated Paul kindly and gave him permission to go to his friends and refresh himself.

kikuyu: Nũũ Jehova aahoire kĩrĩra nĩguo amũmenyithie maũndũ, na nũũ wamũrutire gũthiĩ na njĩra ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire? Nũũ wamũrutire maũndũ ma ũũgĩ, kana akĩmuonia ũrĩa angĩhota gũkuũkĩrwo nĩ maũndũ?
english: or to governors, as sent by him for vengeance on evildoers and for praise to those who do well.

kikuyu: Mũrĩ kũu nĩmũkaririkana mĩtugo yanyu na ciĩko ciothe iria mwĩthaahĩtie nacio, na inyuĩ nĩmũkeemena nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa wothe mwaneeka.
english: There you will remember your ways, and all your deeds in which you have polluted yourselves. Then you will loathe  “Bamah” means “High Place”.

kikuyu: Wee-rĩ, nĩwe wekĩrire mĩhaka yothe ya thĩ; nĩwe watũmire kũgĩe hĩndĩ ya riũa na hĩndĩ ya heho.
english: You have set all the boundaries of the earth. You have made summer and winter.

kikuyu: Mĩromo ya mũthamaki yaragia ũhoro taarĩ ndũmĩrĩri, na kanua gake gatiagĩrĩirwo kuogomia kĩhooto.
english: A rebuke enters deeper into one who has understanding than a hundred lashes into a fool.

kikuyu: no andũ a kũu matiamũnyiitire ũgeni, tondũ aathiiaga Jerusalemu. Rĩrĩa arutwo ake, Jakubu na Johana monire ũguo makĩũria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, nĩũkwenda twĩtie mwaki uume igũrũ ũmaniine?”
english: They didn’t receive him, because he was traveling with his face set toward Jerusalem.

kikuyu: Tũhooere harĩ Jehova Ngai waku nĩguo atwĩre kũrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩgũthiĩ, na ũndũ ũrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩka.”
english: that Yahweh your God may show us the way in which we should walk, and the things that we should do.”

kikuyu: Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkaamũhe gĩkombe kĩa maaĩ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩ ũndũ mũrĩ a Kristũ, ndarĩ hĩndĩ akoorwo nĩ igai rĩake.” Gũtũma Mũndũ Eehie
english: For whoever will give you a cup of water to drink in my name because you are Christ’s, most certainly I tell you, he will in no way lose his reward.

kikuyu: Hamwe na arĩa mooragĩirwo mbaara- inĩ, andũ a Isiraeli nĩmooragĩte Balamu mũrũ wa Beori ũrĩa warĩ mũragũri na rũhiũ rwa njora.
english: The children of Israel also killed Balaam the son of Beor, the soothsayer, with the sword, among the rest of their slain.

kikuyu: “Tĩĩa thoguo na nyũkwa,” rĩu nĩrĩo rĩathani rĩa mbere rĩrĩa rĩrĩ na kĩĩranĩro,
english: “Honor your father and mother,” which is the first commandment with a promise:

kikuyu: Ndĩ hakuhĩ gũtumũra kanua gakwa; ciugo ciakwa irĩ o rũrĩmĩ-inĩ rwakwa.
english: See now, I have opened my mouth. My tongue has spoken in my mouth.

kikuyu: na Magipiashu, na Meshulamu, na Heziri,
english: Magpiash, Meshullam, Hezir,

kikuyu: “Ĩra Harũni na ariũ ake atĩrĩ, ‘Ũũ nĩguo mũrĩrathimaga andũ a Isiraeli. Meragei atĩrĩ:
english: “ ‘The priest shall write these curses in a book, and he shall wipe them into the water of bitterness.

kikuyu: Ũmenyo wakwa ndĩũrutĩte kũraihu; niĩ ngũtũũgĩria kĩhooto kĩa ũcio Mũnyũũmbi.
english: I will get my knowledge from afar, and will ascribe righteousness to my Maker.

kikuyu: Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũgacaambia Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakarekerwo, no ũrĩa wothe ũgaacambia Roho Mũtheru, ũcio ndakaarekerwo, ihinda rĩrĩ tũrĩ kana ihinda rĩrĩa rĩgooka.
english: Whoever speaks a word against the Son of Man, it will be forgiven him; but whoever speaks against the Holy Spirit, it will not be forgiven him, either in this age, or in that which is to come.

kikuyu: Angĩkorwo nĩ ngwaka rĩngĩ kĩrĩa ndaanangire-rĩ, nĩkuonania atĩ niĩ nĩnyunĩte watho.
english: For if I build up again those things which I destroyed, I prove myself a law-breaker.

kikuyu: no andũ aingĩ makĩmenya ũhoro ũcio na makĩmũrũmĩrĩra. Nake akĩmaamũkĩra na akĩmahe ũhoro wa ũthamaki wa Ngai, na akĩhonia arĩa maabatarĩtio nĩ kũhonio.
english: But the multitudes, perceiving it, followed him. He welcomed them, spoke to them of God’s Kingdom, and he cured those who needed healing.

kikuyu: Ta rora Zayuni, itũũra rĩrĩa inene rĩa maruga maitũ; maitho maku nĩmakona Jerusalemu, gĩikaro gĩa thayũ, nĩyo hema ĩrĩa ĩtakenyenyeka; higĩ ciayo itirĩ hĩndĩ ikaamunywo, o na kana mũkanda o na ũmwe wayo ũtuĩke.
english: Look at Zion, the city of our appointed festivals. Your eyes will see Jerusalem, a quiet habitation, a tent that won’t be removed. Its stakes will never be plucked up, nor will any of its cords be broken.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa athingu magaakenga ta riũa thĩinĩ wa ũthamaki wa Ithe wao. Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ nĩ aigue. Ngerekano ya Mũthiithũ Mũhithe, na Ruru
english: Then the righteous will shine like the sun in the Kingdom of their Father. He who has ears to hear, let him hear.

kikuyu: O na ningĩ kaĩ mũthomete Watho-inĩ atĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ, athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa marĩ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ nĩmathaahagia mũthenya ũcio na matituagwo ahĩtia?
english: Or have you not read in the law that on the Sabbath day the priests in the temple profane the Sabbath and are guiltless?

kikuyu: Ndigĩrai ciana cianyu cia ngoriai; nĩngagitĩra mĩoyo yacio. Atumia anyu a ndigwa mũreke o nao manjĩhoke.”
english: “Because you are glad, because you rejoice, O you who plunder my heritage,

kikuyu: Meciiria make nĩmagarũrwo matige gũtuĩka ta ma mũndũ, nake agĩe na meciiria ta ma nyamũ, ihinda ta rĩa mĩaka mũgwanja.
english: Let his heart be changed from man’s, and let an animal’s heart be given to him. Then let seven times pass over him.

kikuyu: O na inyuĩ no nginya mũikarage mwĩhaarĩirie, tondũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agooka ithaa rĩrĩa mũtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire.”
english: Therefore be ready also, for the Son of Man is coming in an hour that you don’t expect him.”

kikuyu: ũguo noguo akaamakia ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ, nao athamaki nĩmagatumia tũnua twao nĩ ũndũ wake. Nĩgũkorwo maũndũ marĩa materĩtwo, nĩmakamoona, na maũndũ marĩa mataiguĩte, nĩmakamenya ũhoro wamo.
english: so he will cleanse† many nations. Kings will shut their mouths at him; for they will see that which had not been told them, and they will understand that which they had not heard.

kikuyu: “Mũrũ wa mũndũ, erekeria ũthiũ waku harĩ Aamoni, na ũmarathĩre ũhoro wa kũmookĩrĩra.
english: “Son of man, set your face toward the children of Ammon, and prophesy against them.

kikuyu: Agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ, “Ihinda nĩrĩroka rĩrĩa mũkeriragĩria kuona mũthenya ũmwe wa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ, no mũtikawona.
english: He said to the disciples, “The days will come when you will desire to see one of the days of the Son of Man, and you will not see it.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Wee nĩwe Rwaro rwakwa rwa Ihiga na gĩikaro gĩakwa kĩirigĩre na hinya,
english: For you are my rock and my fortress, therefore for your name’s sake lead me and guide me.

kikuyu: Ũcio nĩguo warĩ mũigana wa andũ othe arĩa maarĩ a mbarĩ cia Akohathu arĩa maatungataga thĩinĩ wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo. Musa na Harũni maamatarire kũringana na ũrĩa Jehova aathĩte Musa.
english: The king of Egypt also made King Joakim his brother king of Judea and Jerusalem.

kikuyu: Nĩngacirĩithagia kũrĩa kũrĩ na ũrĩithio mwega, na irĩma-inĩ cia bũrũri wa Isiraeli nĩkuo gũgaatuĩka bũrũri wacio wa ũrĩithio. Kũu nĩkuo ikaarahaga, bũrũri ũrĩ ũrĩithio mwega, na irĩĩage ũrĩithio-inĩ mũnoru, kũu irĩma-inĩ cia bũrũri wa Isiraeli.
english: I will feed them with good pasture, and their fold will be on the mountains of the height of Israel. There they will lie down in a good fold. They will feed on rich pasture on the mountains of Israel.

kikuyu: Irio cia mĩgũnda yao aaciheire itono, na maciaro mao akĩmarekereria ngigĩ.
english: He also gave their increase to the caterpillar, and their labor to the locust.

kikuyu: Njiaro cianyu ingĩaingĩhire o ta mũthanga, nacio ciana cianyu cingĩhe ta hĩndĩ cia mũthanga iria itangĩtarĩka; rĩĩtwa rĩao rĩtingĩkaaniinwo, kana rĩanangwo, rĩeherio mbere yakwa.”
english: Your offspring also would have been as the sand and the descendants of your body like its grains. His name would not be cut off nor destroyed from before me.”

kikuyu: Ririkana ũrĩa thũ ĩkũnyũrũrĩtie, Wee Jehova, na ũrĩa andũ arĩa akĩĩgu macambĩtie rĩĩtwa rĩaku.
english: Remember this, that the enemy has mocked you, Yahweh. Foolish people have blasphemed your name.

kikuyu: “Mũrũ wa mũndũ, ambĩrĩria macakaya makoniĩ mũthamaki wa Turo, ũmwĩre atĩrĩ: ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: “ ‘Wee warĩ kĩonereria kĩa ũkinyanĩru, ũkaiyũrwo nĩ ũũgĩ, na ũgathakara o biũ.
english: “Son of man, take up a lamentation over the king of Tyre, and tell him, ‘The Lord Yahweh says: “You were the seal of full measure, full of wisdom, and perfect in beauty.

kikuyu: Nĩatigithagia mũndũ o wothe wĩra wake nĩgeetha andũ othe ombĩte mamenye wĩra wake.
english: He seals up the hand of every man, that all men whom he has made may know it.

kikuyu: Mũrũũthi* nĩumĩte kĩmamo-inĩ kĩaguo; mũniinani wa kũniina ndũrĩrĩ nĩoimagarĩte. Oimĩte gwake oke aanange bũrũri waku. Matũũra maku makaanangĩka, mage mũndũ wa gũtũũra kuo. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ, mwĩhumbei nguo cia makũnia, cakayai na mũrĩre, nĩ ũndũ tũtirĩ tũrehererwo nĩ mangʼũrĩ macio mahiũ ma Jehova.
english: “How can I pardon you? Your children have forsaken me, and sworn by what are no gods. When I had fed them to the full, they committed adultery, and assembled themselves in troops at the prostitutes’ houses.

kikuyu: “Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũũĩ ũhoro wa mũthenya ũcio kana ithaa rĩu, o na araika a igũrũ matiũĩ, o na Mũriũ ndooĩ, tiga Ithe wiki!
english: “But of that day or that hour no one knows—not even the angels in heaven, nor the Son, but only the Father.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo ndaarĩ o hakuhĩ nake ndĩ ta mũbundi mũũgĩ. Ndaaiyũrĩtwo nĩ gĩkeno mũthenya o mũthenya, na ngakenaga hĩndĩ ciothe ndĩ mbere yake,
english: then I was the craftsman by his side. I was a delight day by day, always rejoicing before him,

kikuyu: “Anabii na athĩnjĩri-Ngai matiĩtigagĩra Ngai; o na thĩinĩ wa hekarũ-inĩ yakwa, nĩndĩĩoneire waganu wao,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: for both prophet and priest are profane. Yes, in my house I have found their wickedness,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: “No rĩu-rĩ, ndamũthaitha mwĩtĩkĩre kũndora. Anga no ngĩheenanie o maitho-inĩ manyu?
english: Now therefore be pleased to look at me, for surely I will not lie to your face.

kikuyu: Arũme othe a ũkũrũ wa kuuma mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ nginya mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtano arĩa mookire gũtungata wĩra-inĩ wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo, 36matarĩtwo na mbarĩ ciao, maarĩ andũ 2,750
english: He reigned in Judah and Jerusalem for three months. Then the king of Egypt deposed him from reigning in Jerusalem.

kikuyu: Mathaithana makwa marokinya harĩwe; ndeithũra kũringana na kĩĩranĩro gĩaku.
english: Let my supplication come before you. Deliver me according to your word.

kikuyu: Jehova nĩekĩrĩte mũhaka wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani ũtuĩke wa gũtũhakania ithuĩ na inyuĩ, na andũ aya a Rubeni na Gadi! Gũtirĩ ũndũ mwĩtainwo na Jehova.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio njiaro cianyu ciahota gũtũma ciitũ itige gũcooka gwĩtigĩra Jehova.
english: For Yahweh has made the Jordan a border between us and you, you children of Reuben and children of Gad. You have no portion in Yahweh.” ’ So your children might make our children cease from fearing Yahweh.

kikuyu: Mĩhũmũ yayo ĩgwatagia makara mwaki, naruo rũrĩrĩmbĩ rũkoima kanua kayo.
english: His breath kindles coals. A flame goes out of his mouth.

kikuyu: Kenai na mũcanjamũke, tondũ kĩheo kĩanyu nĩ kĩnene igũrũ, nĩgũkorwo ũguo noguo maanyariirire anabii arĩa maarĩ kuo mbere yanyu. Cumbĩ na Ũtheri
english: Rejoice, and be exceedingly glad, for great is your reward in heaven. For that is how they persecuted the prophets who were before you.

kikuyu: na Keila, na Akizibu, na Maresha; mothe maarĩ matũũra kenda na tũtũũra twamo.
english: Keilah, Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages.

kikuyu: Nĩngamũtheria, ndĩmwehererie andũ arĩa aremi na arĩa manjũkagĩrĩra. O na gũtuĩka nĩngamaruta bũrũri ũrĩa matũũraga-rĩ, matigatoonya bũrũri wa Isiraeli. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova.
english: I will purge out from among you the rebels and those who disobey me. I will bring them out of the land where they live, but they shall not enter into the land of Israel. Then you will know that I am Yahweh.”

kikuyu: “ ‘Ningĩ kũngĩkorwo o na mwekwo maũndũ macio no mũkaarega kũnjookerera na mũgĩthiĩ na mbere kũnjũkĩrĩra-rĩ,
english: “ ‘If by these things you won’t be turned back to me, but will walk contrary to me,

kikuyu: Mwathani, o we Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, nĩamwĩtire mũthenya ũcio nĩguo mũrĩre na mũgirĩke, na mwenjwo njuĩrĩ cianyu na mwĩhumbe nguo cia ikũnia. No rĩrĩ, inyuĩ mũrĩ na gĩkeno na ũrĩĩu, mũrathĩnja ngʼombe na ngʼondu, mũkĩrĩĩaga nyama na mũkĩnyuuaga ndibei! Mũgakiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũrĩe na tũnyue, nĩgũkorwo rũciũ nĩtũgaakua!”
english: He said, “You shall rejoice no more, you oppressed virgin daughter of Sidon. Arise, pass over to Kittim. Even there you will have no rest.”

kikuyu: Mũriũ ũrĩa ũgaacooka ithenya rĩake arĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai mũitĩrĩrie maguta nĩwe ũkaarĩhaarĩria. Gĩkĩ nĩ gĩcunjĩ kĩa Jehova kĩa hĩndĩ ciothe, nakĩo kĩrĩcinagwo biũ.
english: The anointed priest that will be in his place from among his sons shall offer it. By a statute forever, it shall be wholly burned to Yahweh.

kikuyu: “Thuutha waku, nĩgũkarahũka ũthamaki ũngĩ ũtagaakorwo na hinya ta waku. Thuutha ũcio nĩgũkagĩa na ũthamaki ũngĩ wa gatatũ, nĩguo ũgerekanĩtio na gĩcango, naguo nĩũgaatha thĩ yothe.
english: “After you, another kingdom will arise that is inferior to you; and another third kingdom of bronze, which will rule over all the earth.

kikuyu: Mũndũ angĩkaana arata ake nĩ ũndũ wa kĩheo-rĩ, maitho ma ciana ciake nĩmakoora.
english: He who denounces his friends for plunder, even the eyes of his children will fail.

kikuyu: “Matukũ-inĩ ma Shamigari mũrũ wa Anathu, o na matukũ-inĩ ma Jaeli, njĩra nĩciagĩte andũ a kũgerera; agendi maageraga tũcĩra twa mĩkĩra.
english: Israel was brought very low because of Midian; and the children of Israel cried to Yahweh.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire atĩ Abimeleku nĩakuĩte-rĩ, makĩĩinũkĩra.
english: When the men of Israel saw that Abimelech was dead, they each departed to his place.

kikuyu: “Ũrĩa wothe ũkoora nĩ ũndũ wa guoya, ũcio akaagũa irima, nake ũrĩa ũkaahaica oime irima-rĩ, akaagwatio nĩ mũtego; nĩ ũndũ nĩngũtũma Moabi akinyĩrwo nĩ mwaka wa kũherithio,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: “He who flees from the terror will fall into the pit; and he who gets up out of the pit will be taken in the snare, for I will bring on him, even on Moab, the year of their visitation,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Kĩndũ gĩothe kĩarĩ thĩ nyũmũ na kĩarĩ na mĩhũmũ ya muoyo maniũrũ-inĩ makĩo gĩgĩkua.
english: Thus Noah did. He did all that God commanded him.

kikuyu: Angĩkorwo kĩenyũ gĩa kĩmere kĩrĩa kĩrutĩirwo Ngai kĩrĩ maciaro ma mbere nĩ gĩtheru-rĩ, o nakĩo kĩmere gĩothe no gĩtheru; angĩkorwo mũri nĩ mũtheru-rĩ, o nacio honge no theru.
english: If the first fruit is holy, so is the lump. If the root is holy, so are the branches.

kikuyu: Mũigana wao ũgĩcooka ũkĩnyiiha, na makĩagithio hinya, nĩ kũhinyĩrĩrio, na kũnyariirĩka, o na kĩeha;
english: Again, they are diminished and bowed down through oppression, trouble, and sorrow.

kikuyu: Arĩ kũu, akĩĩrirĩria endwa ake, arĩa ciĩga ciao ciatariĩ ta cia ndigiri, na hinya wao wa ũndũrũme woimaga ta wa mbarathi. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũkĩĩrirĩria ũũra-thoni wa wĩthĩ waku, rĩrĩa wahambatagwo gĩthũri na ũkahutio nyondo ciaku cia ũirĩtu ũrĩ kũu bũrũri wa Misiri.
english: As they gather silver, bronze, iron, lead, and tin into the middle of the furnace, to blow the fire on it, to melt it, so I will gather you in my anger and in my wrath, and I will lay you there and melt you.

kikuyu: Maathani maku matũmaga njũhĩge gũkĩra thũ ciakwa, nĩgũkorwo makoragwo hamwe na niĩ hĩndĩ ciothe.
english: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for your commandments are always with me.

kikuyu: Atĩrĩrĩ, Daudi aamwĩtire ‘Mwathani’. Angĩgĩcooka gũtuĩka mũriũ wake atĩa?”
english: “David therefore calls him Lord, so how is he his son?”

kikuyu: Ũhoro wakwa wa ũthingu nĩũrooka o na ihenya, nakuo kũhonokania gwakwa kũrĩ hakuhĩ kuoneka, o nakuo guoko gwakwa nĩkuo gũgaatuĩra andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ciira wa kĩhooto. Andũ a icigĩrĩra-inĩ nĩ niĩ magaacũthĩrĩria na meterere guoko gwakwa marĩ na mwĩhoko.
english: My righteousness is near. My salvation has gone out, and my arms will judge the peoples. The islands will wait for me, and they will trust my arm.

kikuyu: Cooka woe rũgĩo rwa kĩgera, ũrũige rũtuĩke taarĩ rũgiri rwa kĩgera gatagatĩ gaku na itũũra rĩu inene, na ũhũgũre ũthiũ waku na kũu rĩrĩ. Narĩo rĩrigiicĩrio, na nĩwe ũkaarĩrigiicĩria. Ũndũ ũcio nĩũgaatuĩka kĩmenyithia harĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli.
english: Take for yourself an iron pan and set it for a wall of iron between you and the city. Then set your face toward it. It will be besieged, and you shall lay siege against it. This shall be a sign to the house of Israel.

kikuyu: Githĩ ndatũtuaga o ta tũrĩ andũ a kũngĩ? To gũtwendia aatwendirie, no rĩu nĩarĩkĩtie kũhũthĩra indo iria twagũrirwo nacio.
english: thirty milk camels and their colts, forty cows, ten bulls, twenty female donkeys and ten foals.

kikuyu: Wĩrĩhĩrie maita mũgwanja harĩ ndũrĩrĩ iria tũriganĩtie nacio, nĩ ũndũ wa rũmena rũrĩa makũmenete naruo, Wee Mwathani. Na ithuĩ andũ aku, o ithuĩ ngʼondu cia rũũru rwaku, tũkũgoocage nginya tene na tene; nĩtũrahage ũgooci waku, kuuma njiarwa na njiarwa.
english: So Judas, thinking that they would indeed be profitable in many things, agreed to live in peace with them; and receiving pledges of friendship they departed to their tents.

kikuyu: Nĩndĩrĩkumagia Jehova mũno na kanua gakwa; nĩndĩrĩmũgoocaga ndĩ kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ kĩnene.
english: I will give great thanks to Yahweh with my mouth. Yes, I will praise him among the multitude.

kikuyu: Ĩra mũthamaki o na nyina wa mũthamaki atĩrĩ, “Harũrũkai mume itĩ-inĩ cianyu cia ũthamaki, nĩgũkorwo tanji icio cianyu irĩ riiri nĩcikũgũa kuuma mĩtwe-inĩ yanyu.”
english: If I go out into the field, then behold, the slain with the sword! If I enter into the city,

kikuyu: Ndaacũthĩrĩirie thĩ, ngĩkĩona atĩ ndĩarĩ ũrĩa yatariĩ na ndĩarĩ na kĩndũ; ningĩ ngĩcũthĩrĩria matu-inĩ, ngĩona atĩ gũtiarĩ na ũtheri.
english: I saw the earth and, behold, it was waste and void, and the heavens, and they had no light.

kikuyu: Ooni-maũndũ nĩmagaconoka, nao aragũri maconorithio. Othe nĩmakahumbĩra mothiũ mao, tondũ gũtirĩ ũhoro magaacookerio nĩ Ngai.” No hakwa-rĩ, niĩ njiyũrĩtwo nĩ hinya, na ngaiyũrwo nĩ Roho wa Jehova, o na ngaiyũrwo nĩ kĩhooto na ũhoti, nĩguo nyumbũrĩre Jakubu ũremi wake, na nyumbũrĩre Isiraeli mehia make.
english: and I will make that which was lame a remnant, and that which was cast far off a strong nation: and Yahweh will reign over them on Mount Zion from then on, even forever.”

kikuyu: Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda, kũringana na ũrĩa mbarĩ ciao ciatariĩ.
english: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Judah according to their families.

kikuyu: Marĩĩtwa manyu mũkaamatigĩra andũ akwa arĩa ndĩthuurĩire, mamatũmagĩre rĩrĩa mekwenda kũruma andũ; Mwathani Jehova nĩagakũũraga, no ndungata ciake agaaciĩtaga marĩĩtwa mangĩ.
english: You will leave your name for a curse to my chosen, and the Lord Yahweh will kill you. He will call his servants by another name,

kikuyu: Tondũ watho wokire na Musa, no ũtugi na ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma ciokire na Jesũ Kristũ.
english: For the law was given through Moses. Grace and truth were realized through Jesus Christ.§

kikuyu: “Harĩ mũndũ ũngĩgiria andũ aya mabatithio na maaĩ? Andũ aya nĩmamũkĩra Roho Mũtheru o ta ithuĩ.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩathana mabatithio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ Kristũ. Magĩcooka makĩũria Petero aikaranie nao ihinda rĩa mĩthenya mĩnini.
english: “Can anyone forbid these people from being baptized with water? They have received the Holy Spirit just like us.”

kikuyu: akĩruta Isiraeli gatagatĩ-inĩ kao, Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
english: and brought out Israel from among them, for his loving kindness endures forever;

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo tũgĩtige gũtuĩka tũkenge, tũrĩa tũikanagio mwena na mwena, o na tũkĩhurutagwo haha na harĩa nĩ rũhuho o ruothe rwa ũrutani, na tũgĩtwaragĩrĩrio nĩ wara na ũhinga wa andũ ũrĩa maheenagĩrĩria andũ naguo makamahĩtithia.
english: that we may no longer be children, tossed back and forth and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the trickery of men, in craftiness, after the wiles of error;

kikuyu: na itambaya cia mũtwe, na irengeeri cia magũrũ, na mĩcibi, na cuba cia maguta manungi wega, na ithiitũ
english: the headdresses, the ankle chains, the sashes, the perfume containers, the charms,

kikuyu: Jehova nĩwe rĩũrĩro rĩa arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie, kĩĩhitho kĩrĩ hinya hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna. Arĩa mooĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩmarĩkwĩhokaga, nĩgũkorwo Jehova ndũrĩ watiganĩria arĩa makũrongoragia.
english: Yahweh will also be a high tower for the oppressed; a high tower in times of trouble.

kikuyu: Oya gĩcunjĩ gĩkĩ kuuma harĩ nuthu ya igai rĩao mũkĩnengere Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai kĩrĩ gĩcunjĩ kĩa Jehova.
english: Take it from their half, and give it to Eleazar the priest, for Yahweh’s wave offering.

kikuyu: nĩgeetha matikanyue mariganĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa watho uugaga, nao magithie arĩa othe ahinyĩrĩrie kĩhooto kĩao.
english: lest they drink, and forget the law, and pervert the justice due to anyone who is afflicted.

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire Bathaka-rĩ, mũthenya oro ũcio, makĩrĩa maciaro mamwe ma bũrũri ũcio; mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia, na ngano hĩhie.
english: They ate unleavened cakes and parched grain of the produce of the land on the next day after the Passover, in the same day.

kikuyu: O na mũndũ mũkĩĩgu angĩkira nĩonagwo arĩ mũũgĩ, na akoneka arĩ mũtaũku angĩtumia kanua.
english: Even a fool, when he keeps silent, is counted wise. When he shuts his lips, he is thought to be discerning.

kikuyu: ya Ido, aarĩ Zekaria; * 12:1 Ezara ũyũ tiwe Ezara ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai.
english: and Shabbethai and Jozabad, of the chiefs of the Levites, who had the oversight of the outward business of God’s house;

kikuyu: Thuutha ũcio, Jusufu wa Arimathea akĩhooya Pilato mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ. Na rĩrĩ, Jusufu aarĩ mũrutwo wa Jesũ, no amũrũmagĩrĩra na hitho tondũ wa gwĩtigĩra Ayahudi. Nake Pilato akĩmũhe rũtha, nake agĩthiĩ agĩkuua mwĩrĩ ũcio.
english: After these things, Joseph of Arimathaea, being a disciple of Jesus, but secretly for fear of the Jews, asked of Pilate that he might take away Jesus’ body. Pilate gave him permission. He came therefore and took away his body.

kikuyu: Andũ a Isiraeli moima Ramesese, maambire hema Sukothu.
english: The children of Israel traveled from Rameses, and encamped in Succoth.

kikuyu: Hikaniai, mũciare aanake na airĩtu; carĩriai aanake anyu atumia mahikie, nao airĩtu anyu mũreke mahikio, nĩgeetha o nao maciare aanake na airĩtu. Ongererekai na mũingĩhe mũrĩ kũu; mũtikanyihanyiihe. Ningĩ-rĩ, caragiai thayũ na ũgaacĩru wa itũũra rĩu inene kũu ndĩmũthaamĩirie. Hooyagai Jehova nĩ ũndũ warĩo, tondũ rĩngĩgaacĩra-rĩ, o na inyuĩ no mũkũgaacĩra.”
english: even the prophet Jeremiah said, “Amen! May Yahweh do so. May Yahweh perform your words which you have prophesied, to bring again the vessels of Yahweh’s house, and all those who are captives, from Babylon to this place.

kikuyu: Nowe akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, aya maangĩkira, mahiga no maanĩrĩre.” Na rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie itũũra rĩu inene rĩa Jerusalemu, aarĩona akĩrĩra nĩ ũndũ warĩo,
english: He answered them, “I tell you that if these were silent, the stones would cry out.”

kikuyu: Hihi nĩmaconokaga nĩ mũtugo ũcio wao ũrĩ magigi? Aca, maticonokaga o na hanini; o na matirĩ rũkobe. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio o nao makaagũanĩra na arĩa makaagũa; nĩmakarũndwo rĩrĩa makaaherithio, ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: Who is wise enough to understand this? Who is he to whom the mouth of Yahweh has spoken, that he may declare it? Why has the land perished and burned up like a wilderness, so that no one passes through?

kikuyu: O na ndũngĩagwetire rĩĩtwa rĩa mwarĩ wa nyũkwa Sodomu mũthenya ũcio wetĩĩaga,
english: For your sister Sodom was not mentioned by your mouth in the day of your pride,

kikuyu: Mũthenya o ro ũcio maathiire, ndungata cia Isaaka igĩũka, ĩkĩmwĩra ũhoro wa gĩthima kĩrĩa cienjete, ikiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩtwakinyĩra maaĩ!” Nake agĩĩta gĩthima kĩu Shiba, na nginya ũmũthĩ itũũra rĩu rĩtũũraga rĩĩtagwo Birishiba.
english: The same day, Isaac’s servants came, and told him concerning the well which they had dug, and said to him, “We have found water.”

kikuyu: Kuuma kũrĩ marigithathi ma andũ a Isiraeli, akĩũngania betha ya ũritũ wa cekeri 1,365§ kũringana na cekeri ya handũ-harĩa-haamũre.
english: from the firstborn of the children of Israel he took the money, one thousand three hundred sixty-five shekels,‡ according to the shekel of the sanctuary;

kikuyu: “Mwĩtĩĩi ũcio nĩakahĩngwo agwe, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaamũũkĩria; nĩngagwatia matũũra makuo mwaki, naguo nĩũgaacina arĩa othe mamũrigiicĩirie, maniinwo biũ.”
english: The proud one will stumble and fall, and no one will raise him up. I will kindle a fire in his cities, and it will devour all who are around him.”

kikuyu: Gĩtũmi kĩa Firaũni aheo kĩroto kĩu maita meerĩ, nĩ tondũ Ngai nĩatuĩte nĩegwĩka ũndũ ũcio, na ekũwĩka o narua.
english: The dream was doubled to Pharaoh, because the thing is established by God, and God will shortly bring it to pass.

kikuyu: Kĩnanda gĩakwa kĩa mũgeeto kĩrutaga o mũgambo wa gũcakaya, naguo mũtũrirũ wakwa ũkaruta o mũgambo wa kĩrĩro.
english: 1 “I made a covenant with my eyes; how then should I look lustfully at a young woman?

kikuyu: Nĩngũthaitha Euodia o na thaithe Sunutuke nĩgeetha maiguane thĩinĩ wa Mwathani.
english: I exhort Euodia, and I exhort Syntyche, to think the same way in the Lord.

kikuyu: O ũrĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai maingĩhaga, noguo maakĩragĩrĩria kũnjĩhĩria; nao magĩkũũrania riiri wao na kĩndũ gĩa thoni.
english: Don’t sin against the multitude of the city. Don’t disgrace yourself in the crowd.

kikuyu: Wee Jehova, hĩndĩ nĩnginyu wĩke ũndũ, tondũ andũ nĩmathũkĩtie watho waku.
english: It is time to act, Yahweh, for they break your law.

kikuyu: “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, Ngai wa Isiraeli, ekuuga atĩrĩ: Nĩnduĩte atĩ nĩngũmũrehithĩria mwanangĩko, na nyanangithie Juda guothe.
english: “Therefore Yahweh of Armies, the God of Israel, says: ‘Behold, I will set my face against you for evil, even to cut off all Judah.

kikuyu: Andũ ake othe nĩgũcaaya maracaaya magĩetha gĩa kũrĩa; magagĩkũũrania igĩĩna ciao na irio nĩguo matũũre muoyo. “Wee Jehova, ta cũrania wone, nĩgũkorwo ndĩ mũmeneku.”
english: All her people sigh. They seek bread. They have given their pleasant things for food to refresh their soul. “Look, Yahweh, and see, for I have become despised.”

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo ndaarĩ mũhũũtu na mũtiaheire gĩa kũrĩa, na ndaarĩ mũnyootu na mũtiaheire gĩa kũnyua,
english: for I was hungry, and you didn’t give me food to eat; I was thirsty, and you gave me no drink;

kikuyu: nyendie itũũra-inĩ o rĩothe rĩao, nĩĩgacookio Mwaka wa Jubilii, tondũ nyũmba iria irĩ matũũra-inĩ ma Alawii nĩcio igai rĩao thĩinĩ wa andũ a Isiraeli. No ithaka cia ũrĩithio cia matũũra mao itikanendio; icio nĩ ciao nginya tene.
english: But the field of the pasture lands of their cities may not be sold, for it is their perpetual possession.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo Jehova arũithagia arĩa endete, o ta ũrĩa ithe wa mũndũ arũithagia mũriũ ũrĩa akenagĩra.
english: Therefore I will not be negligent to remind you of these things, though you know them and are established in the present truth.

kikuyu: Wee nĩwe ũgaacookererwo nĩ maciaro ma ũũra-thoni waku, na ma maũndũ marĩa wĩkaga marĩ magigi, ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: You have borne your lewdness and your abominations,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: agĩcooka akĩmakaania atĩ matikoige we nĩwe ũ.
english: and commanded them that they should not make him known,  NU reads “actions” instead of “children”  or, Hell

kikuyu: “ ‘Ningĩ andũ a Arabia na anene othe a Kedari maarĩ agũri a indo ciaku; nĩmarutithanirie wĩra wa wonjoria nawe wa tũgondu, na ndũrũme, na mbũri.
english: “ ‘ “Arabia and all the princes of Kedar were your favorite dealers in lambs, rams, and goats. In these, they were your merchants.

kikuyu: Anene a Isakaru maarĩ hamwe na Debora; Ĩĩ-ni, Isakaru maarĩ na Baraka, mamumĩte thuutha na ihenya o nginya kĩanda-inĩ. Ngʼongo-inĩ cia Rubeni nĩ kwarĩ na ũhoro mũnene wa gwĩcookera. Nĩ kĩĩ gĩatũmire mũikare mĩaki-inĩ mũiguage mahiũ makĩhuhĩrwo mĩrũri? Ngʼongo-inĩ cia Rubeni nĩ kwarĩ ũhoro mũnene wa gwĩcookera.
english: He said to him, “O Lord,† how shall I save Israel? Behold, my family is the poorest in Manasseh, and I am the least in my father’s house.”

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa mathugundaga maũndũ ma wĩki naaĩ nĩmanguhĩrĩirie, no-o nĩmaraihanĩrĩirie na watho waku. No Wee Jehova, ũikaraga hakuhĩ, na maathani maku mothe nĩ ma ma.
english: They draw near who follow after wickedness. They are far from your law.

kikuyu: Gĩtũmi kĩa ngũgooce ũrĩa ngũgoocaga ndĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kĩnene kiumĩte harĩwe; niĩ nĩndĩrĩhingagia mĩĩhĩtwa yakwa ndĩ mbere ya arĩa magwĩtigĩrĩte.
english: My praise of you comes in the great assembly. I will pay my vows before those who fear him.

kikuyu: “Mũrungu nĩwe mwene hinya, no ndairaga andũ; we nĩ mwene hinya, na nĩarũmagia muoroto wake.
english: “Behold, God is mighty, and doesn’t despise anyone. He is mighty in strength of understanding.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndagaacĩire, ndoigire atĩrĩ, “Ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngenyenyeka.”
english: I hate those who regard lying vanities, but I trust in Yahweh.

kikuyu: Meciiria manyu nĩmeciiragie maũndũ marĩa ma igũrũ, no ti maũndũ marĩa ma thĩ ĩno.
english: Continue steadfastly in prayer, watching in it with thanksgiving,

kikuyu: maũndũ marĩa thũ ciakwa ciaragia na mĩheehũ ikĩngʼungʼuanaga injũkĩrĩre mũthenya wothe.
english: the lips of those that rose up against me, and their plots against me all day long.

kikuyu: “Eleazaru mũrũ wa Harũni, ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai, nĩwe ũrĩmenyagĩrĩra maguta ma gwakia tawa, na ũbumba ũrĩa ũnungaga wega, na mũtu ũrĩa ũrutagwo hĩndĩ ciothe, o na maguta marĩa maitanagĩrĩrio. Nĩwe ũrĩmenyagĩrĩra Hema-ĩyo-Nyamũre ĩrĩ yothe na indo iria ciothe irĩ thĩinĩ wayo, nĩcio indo iria nyamũre ciĩkĩrĩtwo kuo, na indo cia wĩra.”
english: “The duty of Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be the oil for the light, the sweet incense, the continual meal offering, and the anointing oil, the requirements of all the tabernacle, and of all that is in it, the sanctuary, and its furnishings.”

kikuyu: Mũndũ o wothe ũngĩrĩrĩa mũthenya wa gatatũ, nĩagacookererwo nĩ ũũru ũcio ekĩte, tondũ nĩathaahĩtie kĩndũ kĩarutĩirwo Jehova kĩrĩ gĩtheru; mũndũ ũcio no nginya aingatwo kuuma kũrĩ andũ ao.
english: but everyone who eats it shall bear his iniquity, because he has profaned the holy thing of Yahweh, and that soul shall be cut off from his people.

kikuyu: We aitagĩrĩria irĩma maaĩ moimĩte nyũmba-inĩ ciake iria irĩ igũrũ; thĩ nĩĩiganagwo nĩ maciaro ma wĩra wake.
english: He waters the mountains from his rooms. The earth is filled with the fruit of your works.

kikuyu: Kũrĩa kũriku mũno kuugaga atĩrĩ, ‘Ndũrĩ thĩinĩ wakwa’; narĩo iria rĩkoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Ndũrĩ gũkũ gwakwa.’
english: The deep says, ‘It isn’t in me.’ The sea says, ‘It isn’t with me.’

kikuyu: Kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi maarĩ andũ 45,650.
english: All your valuations shall be according to the shekel of the sanctuary: twenty gerahs† to the shekel.‡

kikuyu: Kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩgĩthikĩrĩria Paũlũ o nginya rĩrĩa oigire ũguo. Hĩndĩ ĩyo gĩkĩaria na mũgambo mũnene kĩanĩrĩire, atĩrĩ, “Mweheriei thĩ! Ndagĩrĩirwo nĩgũtũũra muoyo!” Na rĩrĩa kĩanagĩrĩra gĩgĩteaga nguo ciakĩo na gĩkĩũmbũraga rũkũngũ,
english: They listened to him until he said that; then they lifted up their voice and said, “Rid the earth of this fellow, for he isn’t fit to live!”

kikuyu: Esaũ agĩthũũra Jakubu nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrathimo kĩu aaheirwo nĩ ithe. Nake akiuga na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Matukũ ma gũcakaĩra baba makiriĩ gũkinya; maathira nĩguo ngooraga mũrũ wa maitũ Jakubu.” Rĩrĩa Rebeka eerirwo ũrĩa Esaũ mũriũ ũcio wake mũkũrũ oigĩte, agĩtũmanĩra Jakubu mũriũ wake ũrĩa mũnini, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Esaũ mũrũ wa nyũkwa arehooreria marakara na gwĩciiria ũrĩa egũkũũraga.
english: Esau hated Jacob because of the blessing with which his father blessed him. Esau said in his heart, “The days of mourning for my father are at hand. Then I will kill my brother Jacob.”

kikuyu: Jehova nĩ mwega na nĩ mũrũngĩrĩru; nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ arĩa ehia nĩarĩmonagĩrĩria njĩra ciake.
english: When you said, “Seek my face,” my heart said to you, “I will seek your face, Yahweh.”

kikuyu: Icio nĩcio ciarĩ mbarĩ cia Gadi; arĩa maatarirwo maarĩ andũ 40,500.
english: These are the families of the sons of Gad according to those who were counted of them, forty thousand and five hundred.

kikuyu: Muoyo wonekaga na njĩra ya ũthingu; na njĩra-inĩ ĩyo-rĩ, kũrĩ muoyo ũtagaathira.
english: In the way of righteousness is life; in its path there is no death.

kikuyu: “Nyũmba o yothe ĩrĩa mũrĩtoonyaga-rĩ, ambagai kuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Thayũ ũrogĩa nyũmba ĩno.’ Na kũngĩkorwo nĩ kũrĩ mũndũ mwendi thayũ kuo, thayũ ũcio wanyu nĩũrĩikaraga nake; na kũngĩkorwo gũtirĩ, thayũ ũcio wanyu nĩ ũrĩmũcookagĩrĩra.
english: and didn’t spare the ancient world, but preserved Noah with seven others, a preacher of righteousness, when he brought a flood on the world of the ungodly,

kikuyu: Jehova nĩatũũgĩrĩtio, nĩgũkorwo atũũraga igũrũ; nake nĩakaiyũria Zayuni na ciira wa kĩhooto na ũthingu.
english: For my sword has drunk its fill in the sky. Behold, it will come down on Edom, and on the people of my curse, for judgment.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo nĩmekĩte maũndũ mooru mũno thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli; nĩ matharĩtie na atumia a andũ angĩ, na makaaria ndeto cia maheeni, makĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa, ũndũ itaameerĩte meke. Nĩnjũũĩ ũguo nĩguo, na ndĩ mũira wamo,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga. Ndũmĩrĩri kũrĩ Shemaia
english: because they have done foolish things in Israel, and have committed adultery with their neighbors’ wives, and have spoken words in my name falsely, which I didn’t command them. I am he who knows, and am witness,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: no Saũlũ akĩmenya mũbango ũrĩa maarĩ naguo. Mũthenya na ũtukũ maaikaraga mamuoheirie ihingo-inĩ cia itũũra inene nĩguo mamũũrage. No arũmĩrĩri aake makĩmuoya ũtukũ, makĩmũharũrũkia arĩ gĩkabũ-inĩ mamũgereirie mwanya warĩ rũthingo-inĩ.
english: but their plot became known to Saul. They watched the gates both day and night that they might kill him,

kikuyu: Akĩmaharũrũkĩria nyama nyingĩ ta rũkũngũ, nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ ciaingĩhĩte ta mũthanga wa iria-inĩ.
english: He also rained meat on them as the dust, winged birds as the sand of the seas.

kikuyu: Wee Hinya wakwa-rĩ, nĩngũkũinĩra ngũgooce; nĩgũkorwo Wee nĩwe kĩirigo gĩakwa kĩa hinya, o Wee Ngai ũrĩa ũnyendete.
english: To you, my strength, I will sing praises. For God is my high tower, the God of my mercy.

kikuyu: Wee Jehova, ĩka ndungata yaku kũringana na kiugo gĩaku.
english: You have treated your servant well, according to your word, Yahweh.

kikuyu: Nĩakagĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrũmu na andũ aingĩ handũ ha kiumia kĩmwe. Gatagatĩ-inĩ ga kiumia kĩu nĩagatũma magongona na maruta matige kũrutwo. Na handũ ha mo, mwena ũmwe wa hekarũ-rĩ, nĩakarũgamia kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi na thaahu, o nginya ithirĩro rĩrĩa rĩtuĩtwo rĩgaakinya, nake atũũre aitagĩrĩrio mangʼũrĩ.’ ”
english: He will make a firm covenant with many for one week. In the middle of the week he will cause the sacrifice and the offering to cease. On the wing of abominations will come one who makes desolate; and even to the decreed full end, wrath will be poured out on the desolate.”

kikuyu: Githĩ ti guoko gwakwa gwathondekire indo ici ciothe?’
english: Didn’t my hand make all these things?’*

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene nĩrĩkandehithĩria ngumo na gĩkeno, na gĩtĩĩo, na ũgooci, o na gwĩkĩrĩrwo mbere ya ndũrĩrĩ ciothe cia gũkũ thĩ rĩrĩa andũ akuo makaigua ũhoro wa maũndũmothemegamarĩandĩmekagĩra; nĩkũgegamakaageganamainainemoonaũingĩwaũgaacĩru na thayũ ũrĩa ngaahe itũũra rĩu.’
english: This city will be to me for a name of joy, for praise, and for glory, before all the nations of the earth, which will hear all the good that I do to them, and will fear and tremble for all the good and for all the peace that I provide to it.’ ”

kikuyu: Nĩmagacookanĩrĩrio hamwe o ta ũrĩa andũ oohe macookanagĩrĩrio kĩoho-inĩ; makaahingĩrwo njeera na thuutha wa matukũ maingĩ nĩmakaherithio.
english: They will be gathered together, as prisoners are gathered in the pit, and will be shut up in the prison; and after many days they will be visited.

kikuyu: Jehova Ngai waku arĩ hamwe nawe, o we ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya wa kũhonokania. Nĩarĩgũkenagĩra mũno, na nĩarĩkũhooragĩria na wendo wake, agũkũngũĩre akĩinaga nyĩmbo.”
english: Yahweh, your God, is among you, a mighty one who will save. He will rejoice over you with joy. He will calm you in his love. He will rejoice over you with singing.

kikuyu: Ũguo noguo Daudi oigaga rĩrĩa aaragia ũhoro wa kĩrathimo kĩa mũndũ ũrĩa Ngai atuĩte mũthingu hatarĩ ũhoro wa ciĩko, akoiga atĩrĩ:
english: Even as David also pronounces blessing on the man to whom God counts righteousness apart from works:

kikuyu: Mũthamaki akĩĩra Danieli atĩrĩ, “Ti-itherũ Ngai waku nĩwe Ngai wa ngai iria ingĩ, na Mwathani wa athamaki na mũguũria wa maũndũ marĩa marĩ hitho-inĩ, nĩgũkorwo nĩwahota kũguũria ũndũ ũyũ ũrĩ hitho-inĩ.” Nake mũthamaki agĩtũũgĩria Danieli, na akĩmũtuga na iheo nyingĩ mũno. Akĩmũtua mwathi wa bũrũri wothe wa Babuloni, na akĩmũtua mũrũgamĩrĩri wa andũ arĩa othe oogĩ a bũrũri ũcio.
english: The king answered to Daniel, and said, “Of a truth your God is the God of gods, and the Lord of kings, and a revealer of secrets, since you have been able to reveal this secret.”

kikuyu: Thuutha wa gũthomwo kwa Maandĩko ma Watho na ma Anabii, anene a thunagogi makĩmatũmanĩra makĩmeera atĩrĩ; “Ariũ a Ithe witũ, angĩkorwo mũrĩ na ũhoro wa kũũmĩrĩria andũ- rĩ, maarĩriei.”
english: “Men, why are you doing these things? We also are men of the same nature as you, and bring you good news, that you should turn from these vain things to the living God, who made the sky, the earth, the sea, and all that is in them;

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo nĩaririkanĩte kwĩnyiihia kwa ndungata yake. Kuuma rĩu njiarwa ciothe irĩĩnjĩtaga mũrathime,
english: for he has looked at the humble state of his servant. For behold, from now on, all generations will call me blessed.

kikuyu: Ti-itherũ yakorwo ĩrĩ mĩritũ gũkĩra mũthanga ũrĩa ũrĩ maria-inĩ marĩa manene; na nĩkĩo ndĩrahiũhire kwaria.
english: For now it would be heavier than the sand of the seas, therefore my words have been rash.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩwe Mwathani wa mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”
english: For the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath.”

kikuyu: Ndingĩĩtĩkĩra kuoya kĩndũ, o tiga kĩrĩa kĩrĩĩtwo nĩ andũ akwa, na igai rĩa andũ arĩa tũrathiĩte nao, na nĩo Aneri, na Eshikoli, na Mamure. Acio nĩmooe rũgai rwao.”
english: I will accept nothing from you except that which the young men have eaten, and the portion of the men who went with me: Aner, Eshcol, and Mamre. Let them take their portion.”

kikuyu: Ihinda-inĩ rĩu anabii amwe magĩikũrũka kuuma Jerusalemu nginya Antiokia.
english: As he talked with him, he went in and found many gathered together.

kikuyu: Wee Ngai tũũgĩra, ũtũũgĩrio igũrũ rĩa igũrũ, riiri waku nĩũgĩe igũrũ rĩa thĩ yothe.
english: Be exalted, God, above the heavens! Let your glory be over all the earth.

kikuyu: Una guoko kwa mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu na kwa ũrĩa mũũru; mũrĩhie nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wake ũcio ũtangĩmenyeka.
english: Break the arm of the wicked. As for the evil man, seek out his wickedness until you find none.

kikuyu: Wee-rĩ, to gũthiĩ wathiire na mĩthiĩre yao na ũkĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo yao ĩrĩ magigi, no mĩthiĩre-inĩ yaku yothe nĩwahiũhire gũthũka kũmakĩra.
english: Yet you have not walked in their ways, nor done their abominations; but soon you were more corrupt than they in all your ways.

kikuyu: Wee Jehova, o Wee Ngai ũrĩa ũũhonokagia, ngũkayagĩra mũthenya na ũtukũ ndĩ mbere yaku.
english: I will sing of the loving kindness of Yahweh forever. With my mouth, I will make known your faithfulness to all generations.

kikuyu: no nĩndamaheire rĩathani rĩrĩ: Atĩrĩ, njathĩkagĩrai, na niĩ nĩngũtuĩka Ngai wanyu na inyuĩ mũtuĩke andũ akwa. Thiiagai na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa yothe ndĩrĩmwathaga, nĩguo muonage maũndũ mega. No rĩrĩ, matiigana kũnjigua kana kũrũmbũiya ũhoro ũcio; handũ ha gwĩka ũguo-rĩ, maarũmĩrĩirie ũremi wa ngoro ciao njũru. Nao maacookire na thuutha, makĩaga gũthiĩ na mbere.
english: but this thing I commanded them, saying, ‘Listen to my voice, and I will be your God, and you shall be my people. Walk in all the way that I command you, that it may be well with you.’

kikuyu: Thuutha wa ihinda inyinyi, thĩ ndĩgũcooka kũnyona, no inyuĩ nĩmũrĩnyonaga. Tondũ nĩndũũraga muoyo, o na inyuĩ nĩmũgũtũũra muoyo.
english: If you were of the world, the world would love its own. But because you are not of the world, since I chose you out of the world, therefore the world hates you.

kikuyu: Andũ acio marĩĩtagwo betha-ĩrĩa-ĩregetwo, nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩamaregeete.”
english: Men will call them rejected silver, because Yahweh has rejected them.”

kikuyu: Jehova Kũhũthĩra Ashuri Ningĩ Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Oya kĩbaũ kĩnene, na ũkĩandĩke na karamu ka ndũire ũũ: Maheri- Shalali-Hashi-Bazu. Na niĩ nĩngwĩta Uria ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai, na Zekaria mũrũ wa Jeberekia matuĩke aira akwa ehokeku.”
english: For the head of Syria is Damascus, and the head of Damascus is Rezin. Within sixty-five years Ephraim shall be broken in pieces, so that it shall not be a people.

kikuyu: Efiraimu nĩegwatanĩtie na mĩhianano; tiganai nake!
english: Ephraim is joined to idols. Leave him alone!

kikuyu: “Nyina wa mwana-rĩ, no ariganĩrwo nĩ mwana ũrĩa arongithia, na aage kũiguĩra tha mwana ũrĩa aciarĩte? Hihi no kũhoteke ariganĩrwo, no niĩ ndikaariganĩrwo nĩwe!
english: His affection is more abundantly toward you, while he remembers all of your obedience, how with fear and trembling you received him.

kikuyu: “Wameera maũndũ macio mothe-rĩ, matigaagũthikĩrĩria; o na rĩrĩa ũkaameeta, matigaagwĩtĩka. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, meere atĩrĩ, ‘Rũrũ nĩruo rũrĩrĩ rũrĩa rũregete gwathĩkĩra Jehova Ngai waruo, o na rũkarega gũtaarwo. Ũhoro-wa-ma nĩũthirĩte; nĩũmehereire ũkoima mĩromo-inĩ yao biũ.
english: “You shall speak all these words to them, but they will not listen to you. You shall also call to them, but they will not answer you.

kikuyu: Moima Kĩrĩma kĩa Horu, magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao Zalimona.
english: They traveled from Mount Hor, and encamped in Zalmonah.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo gĩthima kĩa muoyo kĩrĩ kũrĩ we; ũtheri-inĩ waku nĩho tuonaga ũtheri.
english: For evildoers shall be cut off, but those who wait for Yahweh shall inherit the land.

kikuyu: mumagare mũthiĩ Gĩtuamba-inĩ kĩa Beni-Hinomu, hakuhĩ na itoonyero rĩa Kĩhingo-kĩa-Ngĩo. Wakinya hau wanĩrĩre ũhoro ũrĩa ngũkwĩra,
english: and go out to the valley of the son of Hinnom, which is by the entry of the gate

kikuyu: Ũkoiga atĩa rĩrĩa Jehova akaanenehia andũ arĩa watuĩte athiritũ aku nĩguo matuĩke a gũgwathaga? Githĩ ndũkanyiitwo nĩ ruo rũnene, ta rwa mũndũ-wa-nja akĩrũmwo?
english: What will you say when he sets over you as head those whom you have yourself taught to be friends to you? Won’t sorrows take hold of you, as of a woman in travail?

kikuyu: Akĩmũhutia guoko, nake agĩtiga kũhiũha mwĩrĩ, akĩarahũka, akĩambĩrĩria kũmũtungatĩra.
english: “Beware of false prophets, who come to you in sheep’s clothing, but inwardly are ravening wolves.

kikuyu: “Andũ a Isiraeli nĩmambage hema ciao irigiicĩirie Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo no irĩ haraaya nayo, o mũndũ arĩ harĩa bendera yake ĩrĩ ĩrĩa ĩrĩ na marũũri ma nyũmba yao.”
english: “The children of Israel shall encamp every man by his own standard, with the banners of their fathers’ houses. They shall encamp around the Tent of Meeting at a distance from it.

kikuyu: Rũmiai maũndũ marĩa ndĩmwathĩte na mũtikanarũmĩrĩre mĩtugo ĩyo ĩrĩ magigi, ĩrĩa yekagwo mũtaanoka, na mũtikanethaahie nayo. Niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai wanyu.’ ”
english: Therefore you shall keep my requirements, that you do not practice any of these abominable customs which were practiced before you, and that you do not defile yourselves with them. I am Yahweh your God.’ ”

kikuyu: “Njookererai, inyuĩ andũ aya mũũhutatĩire; nĩngũmũhonia nĩguo mũtigacooke gũcooka na thuutha.” Magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ nĩguo, nĩtũgũũka harĩwe, nĩgũkorwo wee nĩwe Jehova Ngai witũ.
english: Return, you backsliding children, and I will heal your backsliding. “Behold, we have come to you; for you are Yahweh our God.

kikuyu: Nĩngagarũra Raba gũtuĩke ũrĩithio wa ngamĩĩra, nakuo Amoni gũtuĩke gwa kwarahwo nĩ ngʼondu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova.
english: I will make Rabbah a stable for camels and the children of Ammon a resting place for flocks. Then you will know that I am Yahweh.”

kikuyu: Kwĩhoka mũndũ ũtarĩ mwĩhokeku hĩndĩ ya thĩĩna, no ta kwĩhoka igego ituĩku, kana kũgũrũ kũrathua.
english: Confidence in someone unfaithful in time of trouble is like a bad tooth or a lame foot.

kikuyu: “Harũrũkai mwehere riiri-inĩ ũcio wanyu, mũikare thĩ kũrĩa kũngʼaru, inyuĩ atũũri a kũu kwa Mwarĩ wa Diboni, nĩgũkorwo ũrĩa ũkaananga Moabi nĩakamũũkĩrĩra, aharaganie matũũra manyu marĩa mairigĩre na hinya.
english: “You daughter who dwells in Dibon, come down from your glory, and sit in thirst; for the destroyer of Moab has come up against you. He has destroyed your strongholds.

kikuyu: Ririkanagai andũ arĩa mohetwo o ta muohetwo hamwe nao, o na mũririkanage arĩa marathĩĩnio taarĩ inyuĩ ene mũranyamario.
english: and that older women likewise be reverent in behavior, not slanderers nor enslaved to much wine, teachers of that which is good,

kikuyu: o na ningĩ Basemathu ũrĩa warĩ mwarĩ wa Ishumaeli na mwarĩ wa nyina na Nebaiothu.
english: and Basemath, Ishmael’s daughter, sister of Nebaioth.

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa matirikaga watho magaathagĩrĩria andũ arĩa aaganu, no arĩa marũmagia watho magianaga nao.
english: Those who forsake the law praise the wicked; but those who keep the law contend with them.

kikuyu: Jehova nĩwe Ngai witũ; matuĩro make ma ciira marĩ thĩ yothe.
english: He is Yahweh, our God. His judgments are in all the earth.

kikuyu: “Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Tigai kwĩheenia, mũgĩĩciiria atĩrĩ, ‘Andũ a Babuloni ti-itherũ nĩmegũtigana na ithuĩ matweherere.’ Matigeeka ũguo!
english: “Yahweh says, ‘Don’t deceive yourselves, saying, “The Chaldeans will surely depart from us;” for they will not depart.

kikuyu: Maitho ma Jehova marĩ kũndũ guothe, magacũthagĩrĩria andũ arĩa aaganu o na arĩa eega.
english: Commit your deeds to Yahweh, and your plans shall succeed.

kikuyu: “ ‘Igũrũ nĩkuo gĩtĩ gĩakwa kĩa ũnene, nayo thĩ nĩ gaturwa ka makinya makwa. Ũngĩkĩnjakĩra nyũmba ya mũthemba ũrĩkũ? Ũguo nĩguo Mwathani ekũũria.
english: ‘heaven is my throne, and the earth a footstool for my feet. What kind of house will you build me?’ says the Lord. ‘Or what is the place of my rest?

kikuyu: O na ũngĩkorwo ũmbũkaga na igũrũ ta nderi, na ũgaaka gĩtara gĩaku o kũu njata irĩ, nĩngakũharũrũkia thĩ ngũrute kuo,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: Though you mount on high as the eagle, and though your nest is set among the stars, I will bring you down from there,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Ngoro yakwa nĩwe ĩĩriragĩria ũtukũ; rũciinĩ roho wakwa ũgakũnyootera. Rĩrĩa watuanĩra ciira wa kĩhooto gũkũ thĩ, andũ a mabũrũri mothe nĩmerutaga ũhoro wa ũthingu.
english: Therefore by this the iniquity of Jacob will be forgiven, and this is all the fruit of taking away his sin: that he makes all the stones of the altar as chalk stones that are beaten in pieces, so that the Asherah poles and the incense altars shall rise no more.

kikuyu: Tondũ ngũmũhe ũrutani mwega, nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũtigatirike ũrutani wakwa. Rĩrĩa ndaarĩ mwana nyũmba-inĩ ya baba, ndĩ o mũndũ mwĩthĩ, na ndĩ mwana wa mũmwe wa maitũ-rĩ,
english: Many will follow their immoral† ways, and as a result, the way of the truth will be maligned.

kikuyu: Ndikaiguĩra ciana ciake tha, tondũ nĩ ciana cia ũtharia.
english: Indeed, on her children I will have no mercy, for they are children of unfaithfulness.

kikuyu: Korwo watho waku tiguo ũngenagia, ingĩanathira nĩ mĩnyamaro yakwa.
english: Unless your law had been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction.

kikuyu: Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩagekĩra maguta mamwe rũhĩ rwa mwena wake wa ũmotho, 27na aminjaminje maguta mamwe ma macio marĩ rũhĩ rwake na kĩara kĩa muoroto gĩa guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo, hau mbere ya Jehova, maita mũgwanja.
english: But if the priest examines it, and behold, there is no white hair in the bright spot, and it isn’t deeper than the skin, but has faded, then the priest shall isolate him seven days.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ irĩma ici irĩ tũcũmbĩrĩ tũingĩ-rĩ, mũrarora na ũiru nĩkĩ, kĩrĩma kĩrĩa Ngai athuurĩte gĩtuĩke gĩikaro gĩake, o kũrĩa Jehova we mwene egũtũũra nginya tene?
english: Why do you look in envy, you rugged mountains, at the mountain where God chooses to reign? Yes, Yahweh will dwell there forever.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo nĩwe ũnyootoraga andũ arĩa anyootu, na akahũũnia arĩa ahũtu na maũndũ mega.
english: For he satisfies the longing soul. He fills the hungry soul with good.

kikuyu: ningĩ mariũko ma njũũĩ nĩmanyiite, na kũrĩa kũrĩ marura gũgaacinwo na mwaki, nacio thigari ikanyiitwo nĩ guoya.”
english: So the passages are seized. They have burned the reeds with fire. The men of war are frightened.”

kikuyu: Icio nĩcio ciarĩ mbarĩ cia Asheri; arĩa maatarirwo maarĩ andũ 53,400.
english: These are the families of the sons of Asher according to those who were

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa marĩ igweta maratũma ndungata ciao igatahe maaĩ; irathiĩ marima-inĩ ikaaga maaĩ. Iracooka na ndigithũ itarĩ kĩndũ; ikehumbĩra mĩtwe iconokete na ikuĩte ngoro.
english: Their nobles send their little ones to the waters. They come to the cisterns, and find no water. They return with their vessels empty. They are disappointed and confounded, and cover their heads.

kikuyu: Ayahudi nĩme- cookanĩrĩirie matũũra-inĩ mao manene mabũrũri-inĩ mothe ma Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu, nĩgeetha matharĩkĩre acio mendaga kũmaniina. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩahotire kũmeetiiria, nĩ ũndũ ndũrĩrĩ icio ingĩ ciothe nĩciametigĩrire. Nao andũ othe arĩa maarĩ igweta a mabũrũri macio, na anene a mũthamaki, na abarũthi, na arĩa mateithagĩrĩria mũthamaki gwathana magĩteithia Ayahudi, nĩ ũndũ nĩmanyiitĩtwo nĩ guoya wa gwĩtigĩra Moridekai.
english: the Jews gathered themselves together in their cities throughout all the provinces of the King Ahasuerus, to lay hands on those who wanted to harm them. No one could withstand them, because the fear of them had fallen on all the people.

kikuyu: na a mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni maarĩ 12,000, na a mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi maarĩ 12,000, na a mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru maarĩ 12,000,
english: of the tribe of Simeon twelve thousand, of the tribe of Levi twelve thousand, of the tribe of Issachar twelve thousand,

kikuyu: “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaanaine na mũthiithũ wahithĩtwo mũgũnda. Na rĩrĩa mũndũ aawoonire, akĩũhitha rĩngĩ, na nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa akenete, agĩthiĩ akĩendia indo ciothe iria arĩ nacio akĩgũra mũgũnda ũcio.
english: “Again, the Kingdom of Heaven is like treasure hidden in the field, which a man found and hid. In his joy, he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field.

kikuyu: Anania agĩĩtigĩria mbeeca imwe, no icio ingĩ agĩcirehe na agĩciiga magũrũ-inĩ ma atũmwo, nake mũtumia wake Safira agĩkorwo nĩooĩ ũhoro ũcio wega.
english: and kept back part of the price, his wife also being aware of it, then brought a certain part and laid it at the apostles’ feet.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ twana twakwa nyendete, inyuĩ mũrĩ a Ngai na nĩmũmatooretie, tondũ ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ wanyu nĩ mũnene gũkĩra ũrĩa ũrĩ gũkũ thĩ.
english: You are of God, little children, and have overcome them, because greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world.

kikuyu: Ayahudi nĩmahũũrire na kĩboko maita matano, o ihinda iboko mĩrongo ĩtatũ na kenda.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all! Amen.

kikuyu: Nĩngamahe ngoro ya gũtũma mamenye atĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova. Nĩmagatuĩka andũ akwa na niĩ nduĩke Ngai wao, nĩgũkorwo nĩmakanjookerera na ngoro ciao ciothe.
english: “Therefore, behold, the days come,” says Yahweh, “that they will no more say, ‘As Yahweh lives, who brought up the children of Israel out of the land of Egypt;’

kikuyu: Ũkai, tũmũinamĩrĩre tũmũhooe, nĩtũturĩrie Jehova o we Mũtũũmbi ndu;
english: But brother goes to law with brother, and that before unbelievers!

kikuyu: irĩkũ cia kũhaandwo, itikanyiitwo nĩ thaahu. No mbeũ icio ingĩkorwo irindĩtwo maaĩ-inĩ, nakĩo kĩimba gĩcigũĩre, mbeũ icio irĩ na thaahu harĩ inyuĩ.
english: But if water is put on the seed, and part of their carcass falls on it, it is unclean to you.

kikuyu: “Niĩ nĩthũire na nganyarara ciathĩ cianyu; ndingĩkirĩrĩria ciũngano cianyu.
english: I hate, I despise your feasts, and I can’t stand your solemn assemblies.

kikuyu: “No akombori acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, ‘Ũyũ nĩwe ũkaagaya mũgũnda ũyũ. Ũkai, rekei tũmũũrage, nĩguo igai rĩake rĩgaatuĩka riitũ.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio makĩmũnyiita, makĩmũũraga, makĩmũikia nja ya mũgũnda ũcio wa mĩthabibũ.
english: “When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, don’t be troubled. For those must happen, but the end is not yet.

kikuyu: Jehova nĩwe wĩkĩte ũndũ ũcio, naguo nĩ wa magegania tũkĩwona.
english: This is Yahweh’s doing. It is marvelous in our eyes.

kikuyu: Andũ acio a itũũra makĩĩra Joashu atĩrĩ, “Umia mũrũguo na nja. No nginya akue, nĩ ũndũ nĩoinangĩte kĩgongona kĩa Baali na agatemenga gĩtugĩ kĩa Ashera kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mwena-inĩ wakĩo.”
english: Then the men of the city said to Joash, “Bring out your son, that he may die, because he has broken down the altar of Baal, and because he has cut down the Asherah that was by it.”

kikuyu: Tũngiuga tũtirĩ na mehia, nĩ kwĩheenia tũkwĩheenia, naguo ũhoro wa ma ndũrĩ thĩinĩ witũ.
english: Again, I write a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light already shines.

kikuyu: nĩwe wombire imũrĩ iria nene, Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
english: to him who made the great lights, for his loving kindness endures forever;

kikuyu: Gũkahaana ta mũndũ ũgũthiĩ rũgendo ũrĩa atigaga egaĩrandungata ciake iroragemũciĩ, o ndungata akamĩhe wĩra wayo, na agatiga atha mũikaria wa mũrango o nake aikarage ehũũgĩte.
english: “It is like a man traveling to another country, having left his house and given authority to his servants, and to each one his work, and also commanded the doorkeeper to keep watch.

kikuyu: Lea agĩcooka akĩgĩa nda ĩngĩ, na agĩciarĩra Jakubu, kahĩĩ ga gatandatũ. Ningĩ Lea akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai ekũhe kĩheo kĩa goro mũno. Rĩu mũthuuri wakwa nĩarĩheeaga gĩtĩĩo tondũ ndĩmũciarĩire ihĩĩ ithathatũ.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩgatua Zebuluni.
english: Laban said, “It is better that I give her to you, than that I should give her to another man. Stay with me.”

kikuyu: Thuutha ũcio gĩkuũ na Kwa-ngoma igĩikio iria-inĩ rĩa mwaki. Icua rĩu
english: The wall of the city had twelve foundations, and on them twelve names of the twelve Apostles of the Lamb.

kikuyu: Kuuma kũu nĩgũkaiguuagwo gũkĩinĩrwo nyĩmbo cia gũcookia ngaatho, na kũiguuagwo mĩgambo ya gĩkeno. Nĩngamaingĩhia na matikanyihanyiiha; nĩngamaheithia gĩtĩĩo, na matikaagithio kĩene.
english: Thanksgiving will proceed out of them with the voice of those who make merry. I will multiply them, and they will not be few; I will also glorify them, and they will not be small.

kikuyu: Musa ndungata ya Jehova hamwe na andũ a Isiraeli nĩmamatooririe. Nake Musa ndungata ya Jehova akĩheana bũrũri wao kũrĩ andũ a Rubeni, na a Gadi, na nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase, gũtuĩke igai rĩao.
english: Moses the servant of Yahweh and the children of Israel struck them. Moses the servant of Yahweh gave it for a possession to the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh.

kikuyu: Magĩcooka makĩmũrehera mũndũ warĩ na ndaimono, na aarĩ mũtumumu, na ndaaragia, nake Jesũ akĩmũhonia, akĩhota kwaria na kuona.
english: Then one possessed by a demon, blind and mute, was brought to him; and he healed him, so that the blind and mute man both spoke and saw.

kikuyu: Rĩu-rĩ, Wee Jehova Ngai witũ, tũhonokie kuuma guoko-inĩ gwake, nĩgeetha mothamaki mothe ma thĩ mamenye atĩ Wee Jehova, o Wee wiki, nĩwe Ngai.”
english: Who are they among all the gods of these countries that have delivered their country out of my hand, that Yahweh should deliver Jerusalem out of my hand?’ ”

kikuyu: Nacio njiaro cia mũthoni-we wa Musa, ũrĩa Mũkeni, ikĩambata ikiuma Itũũra Inene rĩa Mĩkĩndũ irĩ hamwe na andũ a Juda, igĩthiĩ gũtũũrania na andũ a werũ wa Juda ũrĩa ũrĩ Negevu gũkuhĩ na Aradi. Nao andũ a Juda magĩthiĩ hamwe na andũ a Simeoni ariũ a ithe wao, na magĩtharĩkĩra andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga Zefathu, nao makĩananga itũũra rĩu inene biũ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩgĩtwo Horoma.
english: The children of the Kenite, Moses’ brother-in-law, went up out of the city of palm trees with the children of Judah into the wilderness of Judah, which is in the south of Arad; and they went and lived with the people.

kikuyu: “No wee mũrũ wa mũndũ-rĩ, andũ anyu maraaranĩria ũhoro waku marĩ thingo-inĩ, na mĩrango- inĩ ya nyũmba, makeerana atĩrĩ, ‘Ũkaai mũigue ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yũkĩte kuuma kũrĩ Jehova.’
english: “As for you, son of man, the children of your people talk about you by the walls and in the doors of the houses, and speak to one another, everyone to his brother, saying, ‘Please come and hear what the word is that comes out from Yahweh.’

kikuyu: Arũme arĩa othe maatarirwo arĩa maakinyĩtie mweri ũmwe na makĩria maarĩ andũ 6,200.
english: *The people took §Joachaz the son of Josias, and made him king instead of Josias his father, when he was twenty-three years old.

kikuyu: Wee wendete ũthingu no ũgathũũra waganu;
english: But you have saved us from our adversaries, and have shamed those who hate us.

kikuyu: Aamaitĩrĩirie marakara make mahiũ, na mangʼũrĩ, na marũrũ, na muku: akĩmarekereria mbũtũ ya araika arĩa maniinanaga.
english: He threw on them the fierceness of his anger, wrath, indignation, and trouble, and a band of angels of evil.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo andũ othe nĩmehĩtie na makanyiihĩrwo nĩ riiri wa Ngai,
english: for all have sinned, and fall short of the glory of God;

kikuyu: Ndamũkaĩire na kanua gakwa, ngĩmũgooca na rũrĩmĩ rwakwa.
english: I cried to him with my mouth. He was extolled with my tongue.

kikuyu: Ĩrutaga ndogo na maniũrũ taarĩ nyũngũ ĩratherũka ĩhagĩrĩtwo igũrũ rĩa mwaki wa ithanjĩ.
english: Out of his nostrils a smoke goes, as of a boiling pot over a fire of reeds.

kikuyu: na Eni-Rimoni, na Zora, na Jaramuthu,
english: in En Rimmon, in Zorah, in Jarmuth,

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo maroorĩra rũhiũ rwa njora, o rũhiũ rwa njora rũrĩa rũcomoretwo, makoorĩra ũta mũgeete, na makoima kũrĩa mbaara ĩĩhĩire.
english: The Lord, Yahweh of Armies says, “Go, get yourself to this treasurer, even to Shebna, who is over the house, and say,

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo ndikuona kwagĩrĩire gũtũma mũndũ muohe itekuonania maũndũ marĩa athitangĩirwo.”
english: For it seems to me unreasonable, in sending a prisoner, not to also specify the charges against him.”

kikuyu: Ũmũthĩ-rĩ, nĩndagũtua ta itũũra rĩirige na hinya, na ta gĩtugĩ gĩa kĩgera, na ta rũthingo rwa gĩcango, nĩgeetha wĩyũmie ũũkĩrĩre bũrũri wothe: ũũkĩrĩre athamaki a Juda, na anene, na athĩnjĩri-Ngai akuo, o na andũ othe a bũrũri ũyũ.
english: For behold, I have made you today a fortified city, an iron pillar, and bronze walls against the whole land—against the kings of Judah, against its princes, against its priests, and against the people of the land.

kikuyu: Kĩiguei ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova, inyuĩ matigari ma Juda. Ũũ nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, Ngai wa Isiraeli, ekuuga: ‘Mũngĩkorwo nĩmũtuĩte atĩ nĩmũgũthiĩ bũrũri wa Misiri, na inyuĩ mũthiĩ mũgatũũre kuo- rĩ,
english: now therefore hear Yahweh’s word, O remnant of Judah! Yahweh of Armies, the God of Israel, says, ‘If you indeed set your faces to enter into Egypt, and go to live there,

kikuyu: Mĩbara ya mo yarĩ mĩraihu na igũrũ na yarĩ ya kũmakania, nayo mĩbara ĩyo yothe ĩna yaiyũrĩte maitho mĩena yothe.
english: As for their rims, they were high and dreadful; and the four of them had their rims full of eyes all around.

kikuyu: “Arĩa akuũ marĩ na ruo rũnene, o acio marĩ rungu rwa maaĩ na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtũũraga kuo.
english: Behold, even the moon has no brightness, and the stars are not pure in his sight;  Sheol is the place of the dead.

kikuyu: makamũũrie atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩwe warĩ ũũke, kana tweterere mũndũ ũngĩ?” Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Cookai mũkeere Johana maũndũ marĩa mwaigua na marĩa muona:
english: and said to him, “Are you he who comes, or should we look for another?”

kikuyu: na arĩ njĩra-inĩ akĩinũka, aaikarĩte ngaari-inĩ yake ya mbarathi agĩthoma ibuku rĩa Isaia ũrĩa mũnabii.
english: He was returning and sitting in his chariot, and was reading the prophet Isaiah.

kikuyu: Mbũtũ yothe ya ita ĩgĩgĩcooka kambĩ kũrĩ Joshua o kũu Makeda na thayũ, na gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wacookire kwaria kiugo gĩa gũũkĩrĩra andũ a Isiraeli.
english: all the people returned to the camp to Joshua at Makkedah in peace. None moved his tongue against any of the children of Israel.

kikuyu: nĩ ũndũ wa kũrutana mĩtugo ĩrĩa ithuĩ andũ a Roma tũtagĩrĩirwo nĩ gwĩtĩkĩra o na kana kũmĩĩka.”
english: and advocate customs which it is not lawful for us to accept or to observe, being Romans.”

kikuyu: Haaro ĩrĩa ũrutĩire Lebanoni-rĩ, nĩĩgakũhubĩkania, na wanangi waku wa nyamũ-rĩ, nĩũgakũmakia mũno. Nĩ ũndũ nĩũitĩte thakame ya andũ, na ũkaananga mabũrũri, na matũũra manene, na arĩa othe marĩ kuo.
english: For the violence done to Lebanon will overwhelm you, and the destruction of the animals will terrify you, because of men’s blood and for the violence done to the land, to every city and to those who dwell in them.

kikuyu: Mũhaka wa Aamori woimĩte Ituĩkanĩrio rĩa Akirabimu, ũgakinya Sela na ũkahĩtũka.
english: The border of the Amorites was from the ascent of Akrabbim, from the rock, and upward.

kikuyu: Ti-itherũ, arĩa othe matuĩte atĩ nĩmegũthiĩ bũrũri wa Misiri magatũũre kuo, makooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora, na ngʼaragu, o na mũthiro; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao ũgaatigara kana orĩre mwanangĩko ũrĩa ngaamarehithĩria.’
english: So will it be with all the men who set their faces to go into Egypt to live there. They will die by the sword, by the famine, and by the pestilence. None of them will remain or escape from the evil that I will bring on them.’

kikuyu: ariũ a nyina na Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩwagĩrĩirwo uume gũkũ ũthiĩ Judea, nĩguo arutwo aku mone ciama iria ũringaga.
english: His brothers therefore said to him, “Depart from here and go into Judea, that your disciples also may see your works which you do.

kikuyu: Nyina wao akoretwo akĩhũũra ũmaraya, na aagĩire nda ciao na njĩra cia ũũra-thoni. Nĩ ũndũ oigĩte atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩngũrũmĩrĩra endwa akwa, arĩa maaheaga irio ciakwa na maaĩ makwa, na guoya wakwa wa ngʼondu o na gatani yakwa, * 1:4 Jezireeli nĩ kuuga “Ngai nĩaharaganagia”. † 1:6 Lo-Ruhama nĩ kuuga “arĩa mataiguĩrĩirwo tha” kana “andũ matarĩ ende”. ‡ 1:9 Lo-Ammi nĩ kuuga “arĩa matarĩ andũ akwa”. * 2:1 Ruhama nĩ kuuga “arĩa maiguĩrĩirwo tha”, naguo Ammi nĩ kuuga “andũ akwa”.
english: For their mother has played the prostitute. She who conceived them has done shamefully; for she said, ‘I will go after my lovers, who give me my bread and my water, my wool and my flax, my oil and my drink.’

kikuyu: “Atĩrĩrĩ, menya na ũtaũkĩrwo atĩrĩ, ‘Kuuma rĩrĩa gwatuirwo atĩ itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩcookererio na rĩakwo rĩngĩ, nginya rĩrĩa mũtongoria ũrĩa Mũitĩrĩrie Maguta agooka-rĩ, nĩgũkagĩa na ciumia mũgwanja na ciumia ingĩ mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na igĩrĩ. Itũũra rĩu nĩrĩgaakwo rĩngĩ, hamwe na njĩra ciarĩo na mũtaro, no gũgaakorwo kũrĩ mahinda ma thĩĩna.
english: “Know therefore and discern that from the going out of the commandment to restore and build Jerusalem to the Anointed One,‡ the prince, will be seven weeks and sixty-two weeks. It will be built again, with street and moat, even in troubled times.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ hamwe na Alawii othe a thiritũ yanyu nĩamũrehete hakuhĩ nake, no rĩu mũrageria kuoya wĩra wa ũthĩnjĩri-Ngai o naguo.
english: for Demas left me, having loved this present world, and went to Thessalonica; Crescens to Galatia; and Titus to Dalmatia.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinyĩra Isaia, akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ,
english: Then Yahweh’s word came to Isaiah, saying,

kikuyu: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ, “Matukũ nĩmagooka rĩrĩa ngaaherithia andũ othe arĩa maruĩte o mĩĩrĩ yao iiki,
english: Three times I was beaten with rods. Once I was stoned. Three times I suffered shipwreck. I have been a night and a day in the deep.

kikuyu: Nĩngatuĩra Gogu ciira, ndĩmũrehere mũthiro na ũiti wa thakame; nĩngoiria mbura nene mũno, ndĩmuurĩrie we mwene na thigari ciake, o na ndũrĩrĩ icio nyingĩ irĩ hamwe nake, ndĩmoirĩrie mbura ya mbembe na ũbiriti.
english: I will enter into judgment with him with pestilence and with blood. I will rain on him, on his hordes, and on the many peoples who are with him, torrential rains with great hailstones, fire, and sulfur.

kikuyu: O na ũngĩthuthuuria ngoro yakwa na ũnduĩrie ũtukũ, o na ũngĩngeria, ndũrĩ ũndũ mũũru ũngĩona; nĩnduĩte atĩ ndikehia na kanua gakwa.
english: You have proved my heart. You have visited me in the night. You have tried me, and found nothing. I have resolved that my mouth shall not disobey.

kikuyu: Ngoro yakwa nĩĩrahĩĩahĩĩa nĩ kwĩrirĩria mawatho maku o mahinda mothe.
english: My soul is consumed with longing for your ordinances at all times.

kikuyu: Niĩ ngomaga na ngoona toro; ngacooka ngokĩra rĩngĩ, tondũ Jehova nĩwe ũndũũragia.
english: One of the elders said to me, “Don’t weep. Behold, the Lion who is of the tribe of Judah, the Root of David, has overcome: he who opens the book and its seven seals.”

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova, rĩrĩa ngaacina bũrũri wa Misiri na mwaki, nao arĩa othe maamateithagia mahehenjwo.
english: The cedars in the garden of God could not hide it. The cypress trees were not like its branches. The pine trees were not like its branches; nor was any tree in the garden of God like it in its beauty.

kikuyu: “No inyuĩ-rĩ, ũkaai haha, inyuĩ ariũ a mũndũ-wa-nja mũragũri, o inyuĩ ciana cia itharia na cia maraya!
english: “But draw near here, you sons of a sorceress, you offspring of adulterers and prostitutes.

kikuyu: Jehova, tũteithie, nĩgũkorwo andũ arĩa etigĩri Ngai nĩmaniinĩtwo; andũ arĩa ehokeku nĩmathirĩte makoima gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ.
english: Help, Yahweh; for the godly man ceases. For the faithful fail from among the children of men.

kikuyu: Handũ ha ũguo-rĩ, twagĩrĩirwo tũmaandĩkĩre marũa, tũmeere metheemage kuumana na irio iria ithaahĩtio nĩ mĩhianano, ningĩ metheemage kuumana na ũmaraya, na kuumana na nyama cia nyamũ cia gũitwo, o na kuumana na thakame.
english: but that we write to them that they abstain from the pollution of idols, from sexual immorality, from what is strangled, and from blood.

kikuyu: Ndĩramwandĩkĩra tondũ mũtiũĩ ũhoro wa ma, no ngũmwandĩkĩra tondũ nĩmũũĩ ũhoro wa ma, na tondũ gũtirĩ ũhoro wa maheeni uumanaga na ũhoro wa ma.
english: I have not written to you because you don’t know the truth, but because you know it, and because no lie is of the truth.

kikuyu: O na niĩ nĩngwaria; o na niĩ nĩnguuga ũrĩa njũũĩ.
english: I also will answer my part, and I also will show my opinion.

kikuyu: Jesũ Kristũ atũũraga atekũgarũrũka, ira, na ũmũthĩ, o na nginya tene.
english: and soundness of speech that can’t be condemned, that he who opposes you may be ashamed, having no evil thing to say about us.

kikuyu: “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Inyuĩ anene aya a Isiraeli, ũguo mwĩkĩte nĩ mũiganu! Eheriai maũndũ ma ũhinya na ma kũhinyanĩrĩria, mwĩkage ũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ wa kĩhooto na wagĩrĩire. Tigai gũtunyaga andũ akwa indo, ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga. No nginya mũhũthagĩre ithimo iria iringaine wega, na mũhũthagĩre eba ĩrĩa ĩringaine wega, o na bathi ĩrĩa ĩringaine wega.
english: “ ‘The Lord Yahweh says: “Enough, you princes of Israel! Remove violence and plunder, and execute justice and righteousness! Stop dispossessing my people!” says the Lord Yahweh.

kikuyu: na agatũũgĩrio mũno igũrũ rĩa wathani o wothe na ũhoti wothe, na hinya na ũthamaki wothe, na marĩĩtwa mothe ma ũnene marĩa mangĩheanwo, na to mahinda maya moiki, no nĩ o na mahinda marĩa magooka. Nake Ngai akĩiga maũndũ mothe rungu rwa magũrũ make, na akĩmũtua mwathi wa gwathaga maũndũ mothe nĩ ũndũ wa kanitha.
english: far above all rule, authority, power, dominion, and every name that is named, not only in this age, but also in that which is to come.

kikuyu: kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri, ikĩheo Mishali, na Abidoni
english: Out of the tribe of Asher, Mishal with its pasture lands, Abdon with its pasture lands,

kikuyu: Atĩrĩrĩ, ta thikĩrĩria! Arangĩri aku nĩmaranĩrĩra; maranĩrĩra nĩ gũkena marĩ hamwe. Rĩrĩa Jehova agaacooka Zayuni, nĩmakeyonera na maitho mao.
english: He was taken away by oppression and judgment. As for his generation, who considered that he was cut off out of the land of the living and stricken for the disobedience of my people?

kikuyu: “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jehova ekuuga ũũ igũrũ rĩa mũthamaki wa Ashuri: “Ndagatoonya itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene kana arathũkie mũguĩ kuo. Ndagooka mbere yarĩo na ngo kana arĩrigiicĩrie na ihumbu cia tĩĩri, arĩũkĩrĩre.
english: “Therefore Yahweh says concerning the king of Assyria, ‘He will not come to this city, nor shoot an arrow there, neither will he come before it with shield, nor cast up a mound against it.

kikuyu: Luka nowe tũrĩ nake gũkũ. Oya Mariko mũũke nake, tondũ nĩ ũteithio harĩ niĩ ũtungata- inĩ wakwa.
english: But you, man of God, flee these things, and follow after righteousness, godliness, faith, love, perseverance, and gentleness.

kikuyu: “Ningĩ ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaanaine na mwonjorithia wacaragia ruru njega.
english: “Again, the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who is a merchant seeking fine pearls,

kikuyu: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Gĩa na hinya, wee Zerubabeli, na ũgĩe na hinya, wee Joshua mũrũ wa Jehozadaki, mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene, gĩai na hinya inyuĩ andũ othe a bũrũri, na mũrute wĩra, nĩgũkorwo ndĩ hamwe na inyuĩ.’ Ũguo nĩguo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga. 5‘Ũguo nĩguo ndaarĩkanĩire na inyuĩ, rĩrĩa mwoimire bũrũri wa Misiri, na Roho wakwa egũtũũra thĩinĩ wanyu. Tigai gwĩtigĩra.’ * 1:1 Mũthamaki Dario aathamakaga bũrũri wa Perisia mwaka-inĩ wa
english: Yet now be strong, Zerubbabel,’ says Yahweh. ‘Be strong, Joshua son of Jehozadak, the high priest. Be strong, all you people of the land,’ says Yahweh, ‘and work, for I am with you,’ says Yahweh of Armies.

kikuyu: Mahinda-inĩ macio nĩ gwathuurirwo andũ marũgamĩrĩre makũmbĩ ma indo iria ciarutagwo, na maciaro ma mbere, na gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi. Kuuma mĩgũnda-inĩ ĩrĩa yathiũrũrũkĩirie matũũra magĩrĩirwo kurehe makũmbĩ-inĩ icunjĩ iria ciatuĩtwo nĩ watho irĩ cia athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii, tondũ andũ a Juda nĩmakenagĩra athĩnjĩri-Ngai na Alawii arĩa maatungataga.
english: On that day, men were appointed over the rooms for the treasures, for the wave offerings, for the first fruits, and for the tithes, to gather into them according to the fields of the cities the portions appointed by the law for the priests and Levites; for Judah rejoiced for the priests and for the Levites who served.

kikuyu: Thuutha ũcio-rĩ, Moridekai agĩcooka kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũciĩ wa mũthamaki. No Hamani akĩguthũka gwake mũciĩ aiyũrĩtwo nĩ kĩeha,
english: Mordecai came back to the king’s gate, but Haman hurried to his house, mourning and having his head covered.

kikuyu: Niĩ ndĩriragĩria gwĩka wendi waku, Wee Ngai wakwa; watho waku ũrĩ ngoro-inĩ yakwa.”
english: “An evil disease”, they say, “has afflicted him. Now that he lies he shall rise up no more.”

kikuyu: “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maũndũ macio mothe makaahinga, na ti-itherũ nĩmakahinga, hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmaka- menya atĩ thĩinĩ wao nĩ kwarĩ na mũnabii.”
english: “When this comes to pass—behold, it comes—then they will know that a prophet has been among them.”

kikuyu: HAGAI Andũ kwĩrwo maake Nyũmba ya Jehova Na rĩrĩ, mwaka-inĩ wa keerĩ wa gũthamaka kwa Dario,* mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa gatandatũ, ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova nĩyakinyĩire Zerubabeli mũrũ wa Shealitieli, mwathi wa bũrũri wa Juda, na kũrĩ Joshua mũrũ wa Jehozadaki, mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene, na kanua ka mũnabii Hagai makĩĩrwo atĩrĩ,
english: In the second year of Darius the king, in the sixth month, in the first day of the month, Yahweh’s† word came by Haggai the prophet, to Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Joshua the son of Jehozadak, the high priest, saying,

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo acio Ngai aamenyete o tene-rĩ, nĩo aathĩrĩirie matuĩke a kũhaananio na mũhianĩre wa Mũrũwe, nĩguo atuĩke irigithathi harĩ andũ aingĩ a Ithe ũmwe. Nao acio aathĩrĩirie o mbere, nĩo eetire; nao acio eetire, nĩo aatuire athingu; nao acio aatuire athingu, nĩo aahumbire riiri.
english: For whom he foreknew, he also predestined to be conformed to the image of his Son, that he might be the firstborn among many brothers.§

kikuyu: Aaririe, gũgĩũka mĩrumbĩ ya ngi, na rwagĩ rũkĩiyũra bũrũri wao wothe.
english: He spoke, and swarms of flies came, and lice in all their borders.

kikuyu: Nĩatige kwĩheenia na ũndũ wa kwĩhoka maũndũ ma tũhũ, nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ kĩndũ makaamũrehere.
english: Let him not trust in emptiness, deceiving himself, for emptiness will be his reward.

kikuyu: Tondũ nĩathikĩrĩirie-rĩ, ndĩrĩmũkayagĩra rĩrĩa rĩothe ngũtũũra muoyo.
english: Let Israel now say that his loving kindness endures forever.

kikuyu: Moima irĩma-inĩ cia Abarimu, magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao werũ-inĩ wa Moabi hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa Jeriko.
english: They traveled from the mountains of Abarim, and encamped in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

kikuyu: Iruta rĩu rĩa irĩhi rĩa mahĩtia rĩgaathĩnjagĩrwo o harĩa iruta rĩa njino rĩthĩnjagĩrwo, na thakame yarĩo ĩminjaminjĩrio kĩgongona mĩena yothe. Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩarĩrutaga maguta mothe marĩo: maguta ma mũtingʼoe ũrĩa mũnoru, na maguta marĩa mahumbĩire nyama cia nda,
english: In the place where they kill the burnt offering, he shall kill the trespass offering; and its blood he shall sprinkle around on the altar.

kikuyu: “Nake Nafitali aheo gĩcigo kĩmwe; nakĩo gĩkaahakana na rũgongo rwa Asheri kuuma mwena wa irathĩro nginya mwena wa ithũĩro.
english: “By the border of Asher, from the east side even to the west side, Naphtali, one portion.

kikuyu: Mĩromo ya arĩa athingu ĩhũnagia andũ aingĩ, no andũ akĩĩgu makuaga nĩ kwaga gũkũũrana maũndũ.
english: The lips of the righteous feed many, but the foolish die for lack of understanding.

kikuyu: O na korwo ndiahĩtĩtie-rĩ, kanua gakwa no kandue mũhĩtia; korwo ndiarĩ na ũcuuke-rĩ, nĩkangĩanduire mũhĩtia.
english: Aren’t my days few? Stop! Leave me alone, that I may find a little comfort,

kikuyu: ingĩkorwo ndĩĩaga irio ciakwa nyiki, ngaaga kũgayana na ũrĩa ũtarĩ ithe-rĩ,
english: or have eaten my morsel alone, and the fatherless has not eaten of it

kikuyu: O na ingĩĩthamba na thabuni, na ndĩĩthambe moko na igata-rĩ,
english: If I wash myself with snow, and cleanse my hands with lye,

kikuyu: Agĩcooka akĩmatũmĩra ndungata ingĩ nyingĩ kũrĩ iria aatũmĩte mbere, nao akombori acio magĩciĩka o ro ũguo.
english: Again, he sent other servants more than the first; and they treated them the same way.

kikuyu: “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli, ũmeere atĩrĩ: ‘Rĩrĩa mũkaaringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mũtoonye bũrũri wa Kaanani-rĩ,
english: “ ‘You shall mark out your east border from Hazar Enan to Shepham.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ andũ a Zayuni, canjamũkai, mũkenere Jehova Ngai wanyu, nĩgũkorwo nĩamũheete mbura ya mbere nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu wake. Nĩamuurĩirie mbura nyingĩ ya mbere na ya thuutha, o ta mbere.
english: “Be glad then, you children of Zion, and rejoice in Yahweh, your God; for he gives you the early rain in just measure, and he causes the rain to come down for you, the early rain and the latter rain, as before.

kikuyu: Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ nĩmũheetwo ũmenyo wa kũmenya hitho cia ũthamaki wa Ngai, no arĩa angĩ ndĩmaaragĩria na ngerekano, nĩgeetha, “ ‘maarora, makaaga kuona; na maigua, makaaga gũtaũkĩrwo.’
english: He said, “To you it is given to know the mysteries of God’s Kingdom, but to the rest it is given in parables, that ‘seeing they may not see, and hearing they may not understand.’*

kikuyu: ningĩ angĩkorwo nĩ kũũmĩrĩria andũ, nĩakĩũmanagĩrĩrie; na angĩkorwo nĩ wa kũrũmbũiya mabata ma andũ arĩa angĩ, nĩakĩheanage na ũtaana; angĩkorwo nĩ wa gũtongoria, nĩatongoragie na kĩyo; ningĩ ũrĩa wa kũiguanĩra tha, nĩekage ũguo akenete. Wendani
english: or he who exhorts, to his exhorting; he who gives, let him do it with generosity; he who rules, with diligence; he who shows mercy, with cheerfulness.
